description: Unified external recipe database — cleaned v2.4.0 (31 invalid recipes removed, macro recalculations applied, slot reclassification)

recipes.title: Doro Wat Ethiopian Chicken Stew
recipes.description: This spicy, mouthwatering, and comforting one-pot chicken stew is slowly simmered in a blend of robust spices. This delightfully delicious chicken dinner is super easy! Pair it with injera and Ethiopian collard greens to complete your iconic Ethiopian experience.
ingredients: 3-3½ pounds (1.3-1.6kg) chicken, (cut in pieces (or chicken thighs))
3 tablespoons (42g) spiced butter, (or more (sub with cooking oil))
4-6 large eggs, (soft boiled and shells removed)
instructions: Season chicken with, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Heat a large pot over medium heat, and when it's hot, add spiced butter and onions. Sauté onions, stirring frequently, until they are deep brown - 7-10 minutes.
After the onions are caramelized or reach a deep brown color, add some more oil, followed by the Berbere spice, garlic, and ginger.
Stir for about 2-3 minutes for the flavors to blossom and the mixture has a deep rich brown color. Be careful not to let it burn.
Then add about 2-3 cups water. Add chicken, tomato paste, paprika, basil, salt, and cook for about 30 minutes.
Throw in the eggs and lemon juice; thoroughly mix to ensure that the eggs are immersed in the sauce.
Continue cooking until chicken is tender about 10 minutes or more.
Adjust sauce thickness and seasoning with water or broth, lemon, salt according to preference.
Serve warm.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Lentil Stew
recipes.description: A deliciously healthy and spicy vegetarian lentil recipe with homemade berbere spice, spiced butter, and satisfying lentils. Every spoonful of this delectable meal will have you sighing in pure delight. And you won't even miss the meat!
ingredients: 2 cups (475ml) broth ((beef, vegetable, chicken, or water))
instructions: Wash your lentils, then let them soak while you prepare the seasonings.
Heat a large saucepan with oil and spiced butter, then add onions, berbere spice, garlic, ginger, cumin, and smoked paprika. Stir occasionally for 2-3 minutes until the onions are translucent.
Then add the soaked lentils and tomato paste. Stir and sauté for 2-3 more minutes. Add stock or water and season with salt.

Bring to a boil and let it simmer until it thickens. It might take about 30 minutes, depending on how you like your lentils. Throw in some parsley, adjust for salt and pepper, and adjust the stew's consistency.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Cabbage
recipes.description: This healthy combination of crunchy cabbage, tender carrots, and potatoes is infused with deep, earthy spices. Absolutely delicious, vegan, and naturally gluten-free!
ingredients: ½ cup (120ml) olive oil (or canola oil)
½ teaspoon (1g) cayenne pepper ((more or less to taste))
8 cups (600g) chopped cabbage ((about ½ cabbage head))
instructions: Heat oil over medium heat in a large saucepan or Dutch oven.
Add the onions and let them saute for a minute or two, then add the carrots, potatoes, and tomatoes.
Stir in the spices: garlic, cumin, smoked paprika, curry, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Simmer for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Pour about 1 cup of water into the saucepan (add more as needed). Simmer for 10-15 minutes until the potatoes are almost tender.
Finally, add cabbage and green pepper, stir, and continue cooking for about 5 minutes.
Adjust for seasonings. Serve hot.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Yataklete kilkil
recipes.description: Ethiopian Yataklete Kilkil is a healthy dish made with potatoes, green beans, and carrots; all infused with delicious spices for that wonderful explosion of flavors. A meal that's good for your taste buds and waist!
ingredients: ¼ cup or more canola oil
½ teaspoon curry powder or turmeric spice
½ teaspoon white or black pepper
1 teaspoon salt, (plus more adjust to suit taste buds)
instructions: Add potatoes in a large saucepan, salt, and add water just enough to cover potatoes. Boil until tender - about 10 minutes or more. Remove and drain water.

In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat. Add onions, give it a minute or two then stir in all the spices; garlic, Jalapenos peppers, ginger, coriander, smoked paprika, curry, white pepper, and chili pepper. Simmer for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burns. Then add tomatoes and bring to a boil and simmer for another 5 minutes.
Then add potatoes, green beans, and carrots. Season with salt.
Continue to simmer for about 10 minutes; stirring frequently to allow the flavors to blend. If needed, add water to prevent any burns.
Adjust for seasonings. Serve warm.

recipes.title: Ye'abesha Gomen (Ethiopian Collard Greens)
recipes.description: Ethiopian Collard Greens aka Ye’abasha Gomen- Braised collard greens and kale seasoned with aromatics; Quick, easy and tasty.
ingredients: 3 or more tablespoons Niter (Ethiopian Spiced Butter or cooking oil)
1-2 Fresh Chili pepper or ½ teaspoon cayenne pepper or more
instructions: In a large skillet, add oil, spiced butter, garlic, ginger, chili pepper, cumin, cardamom, paprika, sauté for about 30 seconds or more, be careful not to let the ingredients burn.
Then add onions, mix with the spices. Sauté for about 3-5

Throw in chopped collards, cayenne pepper, lemon juice, Continue cooking for another 7-10 minutes until flavors have blend and greens are cooked, according to preference. Adjust seasonings –Salt and pepper, turn off the heat.
Remove from the heat and let it cool. SERVE WITH DORO WAT

recipes.title: Ethiopian Spiced Butter
recipes.description: Niter kibbeh is a must-have ingredient for tasty Ethiopian recipes. Spice-infused clarified butter delivers an incredible depth of flavor even when you're not cooking African food. Ramp up any saute with versatile ghee.Makes about 1½ cups
instructions: Place butter in a medium saucepan and melt it completely on low heat.
Simmer without letting it brown until the surface is completely coated with foam.
Skim off the foam as it rises to the surface until no foam remains. It should be transparent.
Add all spices: onions, garlic, cardamom, fenugreek, cumin, ginger, nutmeg, oregano, turmeric, and basil.
Continue cooking on low heat for 15-20 minutes.
Pass it through a cheesecloth or sieve. It's now ready to use. Store in a tightly covered glass container. It will last for 5-6 months at room temperature and up to a year in the fridge.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Injera Bread
recipes.description: This Ethiopian Injera Bread recipe is a quick and easy take on the traditional Injera and features a sourdough crepe-like flatbread that you can make at home!
instructions: In a large bowl, mix both flours, salt, and baking soda together. Whisk in the club soda until smooth. Then add the vinegar and whisk.
Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Pour oil on a paper towel and wipe the skillet with the oiled paper towel. This creates a thin fatty layer to make it easier to flip the crepes.
Using a scoop, pour batter into the skillet creating a 6-inch circle. Quickly and carefully swirl the pan around to thin out the batter until it measures 8- to 9-inches across.

Cook for 1 minute, then using a large spatula, flip the Injera over and cook another minute. Remove from the skillet and stack on a plate. Repeat with remaining batter. The Injera will seem slightly crisp in the pan, but will soften immediately when placed on the plate. The stacking also helps steam and soften the Injera sourdough crepes.

Once finished cooking the Injera. Cut the circles in half with a pizza cutter, roll into tubes and stack. Keep warm until ready to serve. Serve the Injera with Doro Wat or Mesir Wat, tearing pieces of Injera and using it to pick up the Doro Wat.

recipes.title: Kitfo (Ethiopian Steak Tartare Recipe)
recipes.description: This Ethiopian Kitfo beef tartare recipe features high-quality steak minced and combined with bold spices. Enjoy with injera and nearly any sides!
instructions: Set out a large high-powered food processor. Make sure to trim all the silver skin and fat off the fillet and cut the fillet into large chunks. Place in the food processor.

Add the cayenne, salt, anchovy paste, garlic powder, and cardamom. Pulse to chop the fillet into fine chunks. You can choose to stop with when the beef resembles ¼ inch chunks, or chop smaller into ground steak.
Once the texture is to your liking, melt the clarified butter and pour over the top. Mix the butter in by hand, do not pulse.
Serve raw immediately, cover and chill, or pan-fry over high heat for 1 -2 minutes.

recipes.title: Pomegranate Rice
recipes.description: Pomegranate Rice is a delightful dish that combines the sweet, tart flavor of fresh pomegranate seeds with aromatic and fragrant fluffy rice. This vibrant dish is visually appealing and packed with many health benefits.
ingredients: 1 1/2 inch Cinnamon (or a teaspoon of ground cinnamon)
instructions: Take 1/4 cup rice and make sure to remove excess water using a paper towel.
Add ghee to a skillet and add rice. Stir the rice until it turns nutty brown in color. Then transfer to a bowl.(Note: Keep stirring the rice so as to avoid burning).
Take a stockpot and add oil to it. When oil is hot, add onions. When the onions start to change color, add ginger and cook for 1 more minute.
Next, add nutty brown rice and leftover soaked rice, along with water, salt, bay leaf, and cinnamon.

Let it come to a boil, then change the temperature to low. Cook it until the rice is fluffy and cooked and the water is absorbed. (Note: Scroll up to see my Step-by-Step Instructions with images for each step).
Transfer rice to a serving bowl. Lastly, garnish with herbs (parsley, mint, cilantro), pistachios, and pomegranate seeds, and enjoy!

recipes.title: Ethiopian Spris
recipes.description: This Ethiopian spris is a layered fruit smoothie drink that's absolutely delicious. Made with fresh papaya, mango, and avocado. Without a doubt, one of the most refreshing and delicious drinks I've ever had!
instructions: Cut the papaya in half and then into 1/4. Chop the 1/4 section and set it aside.
Cut and chop the mangoes and avocadoes and set them aside.
Place each of the fruits into three large different cups to blend with an immersion blender.
Add 1/3 cup of sugar to each cup, 1/3 cup of cold water, 1/3 cup of ice, and 1 tablespoon of lime juice. Blend it until smooth. All three juices should be smooth and creamy.

To layer, start by spooning the papaya mixture into a glass. Next, spoon the avocado mixture, and finally, spoon the mango mixture on top. You do not want to simply pour the mixtures on top on top of each other as they can sometimes sink into each other.
Garnish with lime zest and mint if desired. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Spiced Chicken)
recipes.description: The national dish of Ethiopia, this spicy chicken stew is simply outstanding!
ingredients: 3 lbs chicken thighs (, cut into 1 inch pieces, or 3 chicken breasts, cut into 1/2 inch pieces)
1/2 cup Tej (Ethiopian honey wine) ((alternatively you can substitute white wine mixed with 1 teaspoon honey))
4 hard-boiled eggs (, pierced all over with fork about 1/4 inch deep)
instructions: Place the onions in a food processor and finely mince them to a chunky puree. Set aside.Place the chicken pieces in a bowl and pour lemon juice over. Let sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes.

Heat the niter kibbeh or butter along with the olive oil in a Dutch oven or heavy pot. Add the onions and saute, covered, over low heat for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon butter and continue to saute, covered, for another 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of butter and saute, covered, over low heat for another 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.Add the chicken, broth, salt and wine and bring to a boil....
Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with injera, bread or rice.

recipes.title: Misir Wat (Ethiopian Spiced Red Lentils)
recipes.description: One of Ethiopia's most popular vegetarian dishes, you'll be blown away by the incredible flavor!
ingredients: 1 large yellow onion, very finely diced
instructions: Melt 3 tablespoons of the niter kibbeh in a medium stock pot. Add the onions and cook over medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes until golden brown. Add the garlic, tomatoes, tomato paste and 1 tablespoon of the berbere and cook for 5-7 minutes. Reduce the heat if needed to prevent burning.Add the lentils, broth and salt, bring it to a boil, reduce the heat to low and cover and simmer the lentils, stirring occasionally, for 40 minutes (adding more broth if needed) or until the lentils are soft.St...

recipes.title: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
recipes.description: Sega Wat is the beef version of Doro Wat, the national dish of Ethiopia.  Incredibly delicious with a wonderfully deep and robust flavor, your taste buds will thank you!
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
instructions: Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...

Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

recipes.title: Authentic Injera (Ethiopian Flatbread)
recipes.description: Experience the unique flavor and texture of this famous fermented Ethiopian bread!
ingredients: 2 cups teff flour, brown or ivory (, or substitute a portion of it with some barley or wheat flour (note: teff is gluten free))
Note: If you're new to making injera I recommend using a combination of teff and barley or wheat as 100% teff is more challenging to work with.
3 cups distilled water ((fluoride and chlorine will both interfere with the fermentation process))
Note: This method involves wild yeast fermentation. See blog post for details about using commercial yeast as a starter
instructions: See blog post for detailed instructions*NOTE: Using mostly or all teff (which is the traditional Ethiopian way) will NOT produce the spongy, fluffy injera served in most restaurants which are adapted to the western palate and use mostly wheat, sometimes a little barley, and occasionally a little teff added in.

In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and water (and yeast if you're using it). Loosely place some plastic wrap on the bowl (it needs some air circulation, you just want to keep any critters out) and let the mixture sit undisturbed at room temperature for 4-5 days (the longer it ferments, the deeper the flavor). (Depending on what kind of flour you're using, you may need to add a little more water if the mixture is becoming dry.) The mixture will be fizzy, the color will be very...

In a small saucepan, bring 1 cup of water to a boil. Stir in 1/2 cup of the injera batter, whisking constantly until it is thickened. This will happen pretty quickly. Then stir the cooked/thickened batter back into the original fermented batter. Add some water to the batter to thin it out to the consistency of crepe batter. I added about 2/3 cup water but this will vary from batch to batch. The batter will have a sweet-soured nutty smell.

Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Depending on how good your non-stick pan is, you may need to very lightly spray it with some oil. Spread the bottom of the skillet with the injera batter - not as thin as crepes but not as thick as traditional pancakes. Allow the injera to bubble and let the bubbles pop. Once the bubbles have popped, place a lid on top of the pan and turn off the heat. Let the injera steam cook for a couple or so more minutes until cooked through. Be careful not to o...

IMPORTANT NOTE:  Both the texture and color of the injera will vary greatly depending on what kind of teff you use (dark or ivory) and whether or not you're combining it with other flours.  Gluten-based flours (e.g. wheat and barley) will yield a much different texture than 100% teff.  In the pictures and recipe below I'm using 100% dark teff, something you will not find in restaurants and will look different than what most are accustomed to, but is traditional to Ethiopian hom...

recipes.title: Savory Teff Cakes with Wilted Chard
recipes.description: A healthy, vegan dinner recipe that is full of protein and nutrients! A delicious, easy and savory way to prepare teff, the world's smallest ancient grain and incorporate it into our everyday meals. * THIS RECIPE REQUIRES 4 HOURS "cooling time" to set up properly.
ingredients: 1 1/2 cups teff ( whole grain, not flour)
1 teaspoon Herbs de Provence or Italian seasoning
1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved or sliced
1/4 cup Italian parsley ( or cilantro or basil) chopped
instructions: Cook the teff. In a medium pot, heat oil over medium heat. Add shallot and saute until fragrant and deeply golden. Add water, teff, salt, spices and whisk until smooth. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover and cook 15 minutes, or until teff is tender (yet still intact) and when stirred has a consistency of a thick porridge.

Grease an 8×8 inch baking dish with olive oil. Give teff a good stir and pour into the baking dish. Using an oiled spatula, smooth the top. Let this cool and place into the fridge until it sets up and is firm, about 4 hours (or overnight). If making ahead see notes.
Once teff is cooled and firm, cut into four squares. Remove cakes, then cut each into two triangles. ( See notes, for appetizer version.)

Pan fry the teff cakes in a skillet, with a little oil, over medium heat, until crispy and heated through, about 5-6 minutes on each side. Place in a warm oven if you like. (Alternately, you can bake these on a greased, parchment-lined sheet pan- 20 mins @400F . Brush the tops with olive oil. )

Wipe out the skillet, heat 1 tablespoon oil over medium heat and add garlic, stirring until golden, about 2-3 mintues. Add Kale and gently wilt. Add a splash of white wine and season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
Place tomatoes, parsley, olive oil, and balsamic in a small bowl and mix. Season with salt and pepper.

Place the warm, crispy teff cakes ( 2 triangles per person) on a plate, layering with the chard. Divide the tomato relish over the top, spooning any remaining dressing on or around the cakes. Serve immediately!

recipes.title: Teff Porridge
recipes.description: Teff Porridge with figs and walnuts - an easy introduction to this tiny, but mightily nutritious grain, packed full of protein. A simple delicious vegan breakfast!
ingredients: generous 3-finger pinch of and ground warming spice- like ground clove, cardamom, nutmeg, or cinnamon, allspice or even 5 spice.
generous 3 finger pinch of kosher salt
fresh fruit- sliced figs or berries or pears
2 tablespoons crushed, toasted walnuts- or any other nut.
instructions: Over medium-high heat, In a small pot, toast teff until it begins to pop, and smell nutty- stirring often, about 3 minutes.
Once you hear its adorable popping, add water and spices and salt.
Bring to a boil, cover and simmer on low heat for 10 minutes. Give a quick stir and at this point,
If it seems too thick, add a bit more water, to get it to your desired consistency. Cook a couple more minutes.
Divide among 2 bowls and top with sliced figs, walnuts and a generous drizzle of honey.

recipes.title: Berbere Potatoes
recipes.description: Berbere Potatoes- a simple flavorful Ethiopian-inspired side dish that is healthy, delicious and vegan!
ingredients: 1.5 lbs thin-skinned potatoes, thinly sliced (yukons, red, etc)
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F

In a cast iron or oven-proof skillet, heat the oil over medium heat, add the shallots and saute, stirring until tender, 4-5 minutes. Add the garlic and cook 2 minutes, until fragrant. Add the tomatoes and their juices, and continue cooking until they begin to break down and soften, 3-4 minutes. Stir in the Berbere spice and the water.
Scoop out ¾ cup of the mixture and set aside.
Add the potatoes tossing to coat each side and layer them. Pour the remaining tomato mixture over top.
Cover tightly with a lid or with foil. Bring to a hard simmer on the stovetop, then place in the oven for 30 minutes covered.
Remove lid, checking that potatoes are fork-tender, drizzle with olive oil, bake an additional 10 minutes uncovered.
Scatter with fresh parsley. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Chickpea Flour Shiro Wat
recipes.description: It's easy to make shiro wat with chickpea flour. This richly flavored soup uses a homemade spice mix to replace the traditional berbere spice for a less spicy alternative that is perfect for kids and people who want to enjoy Ethiopian food without the heat.
instructions: For a spicy shiro wat, replace the spice mix with 3 Tbsp of berbere spice. The flavor will be similar, but with the kick of heat. Otherwise, mix the spices in a small bowl and set them aside.
Place the onions in a food processor and pulse until fully pureed.
Saute the onion puree in a dry pot until it is starting to brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the oil and spices. Saute for another 1-2 minutes until the spices are fragrant.
Add tomato paste and garlic, and saute for 2-3 minutes more.

Whisk in the chickpea flour, fully coating the flour in the oil. Then gradually start to add the water, whisking constantly like you were making a thickened sauce. Continue whisking until the mixture is smooth.
Bring to a simmer and cook for another 5 minutes.
Finish with the butter and salt to taste.
Serve with fresh injera.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Collard Greens and Chard
ingredients: ¼ cup unsweetened, unflavored plant-based milk
1 bunch collard greens, stems removed and leaves chopped (4 cups)
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium. Add garlic; cook and stir 1 minute. Add milk, coriander, cumin, and cardamom; cook and stir 1 minute. Add collard greens; cook 10 minutes or until greens are wilted, stirring frequently.
Add Swiss chard; cook 10 minutes or until all greens are wilted and tender, stirring frequently. Season with salt.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Wild Rice Pilaf
ingredients: 2 medium leeks (white and light green parts), diced and rinsed
¾ teaspoon berbere spice Blend, or to taste
2 cups cooked adzuki beans, or one 15-ounce can, drained and rinsed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
4 green onions (white and green parts), thinly sliced
instructions: Place the leeks in a large saucepan, and sauté over medium heat for 10 minutes. Add water 1 to 2 tablespoons at a time to keep the leeks from sticking to the pan.

Add the garlic and cook for 2 minutes. Add the berbere spice and cook for 30 seconds. Stir in the wild rice, beans, and orange zest, and season with salt and pepper. Cook until the mixture is heated through.
Garnish with the green onions.

recipes.title: Quick and Easy Injera
instructions: In a large bowl combine the first five ingredients (through salt). Whisk in sparkling water and lemon juice until a smooth batter forms. Let rest 20 minutes.

Before cooking injera, set a cooling rack inside a baking sheet. (This will prevent moisture condensation from building up under just-cooked injera, so you can keep them warm without them getting sticky.)

Heat a medium nonstick skillet over medium. Pour ½ cup batter into the skillet in a circular motion, moving from the outer edges inward and making concentric circles that completely cover the surface of the skillet. Cook 30 to 60 seconds. Using a wide spatula, flip injera over and cook 30 seconds more. Transfer cooked injera to prepared cooling rack; cover with a clean cloth. Repeat with remaining batter.
Let injera cool completely. Fold or roll injera. Serve at room temperature. Place injera in an airtight container; cover. Store in the refrigerator up to 3 days.

recipes.title: Tikil Gomen (Ethiopian-Style Cabbage, Potatoes, and Carrots)
ingredients: 2 cups cubed Yukon Gold potatoes (1-inch cubes)
1 fresh jalapeño chile, slit vertically on one side and seeded
instructions: In a large skillet combine onion, garlic, and ¼ cup water. Cover and cook over medium 10 minutes or until onion is tender, stirring occasionally and adding water, 1 to 2 tablespoons at a time, as needed to prevent sticking.

Add the next five ingredients (through turmeric) and ½ cup water; cook, covered, 15 minutes more or until potatoes are tender, stirring occasionally and adding water, 1 to 2 tablespoons at a time, as needed to prevent sticking.
Remove and discard jalapeño. Season with salt and stir in lemon juice. Serve warm.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Asa Tibs
recipes.description: Ethiopian Asa Tibs & Berbere Spice Mix is a delicious fried fish treat for any party. The ubiquitous Ethiopian spice blend is so versatile and can be used with any variety of foods.
ingredients: 2 pounds monkfish (or your favorite white flesh fish)
instructions: Sprinkle berbere over fish and leave for 1 hour to marinate.

Heat enough oil in a large skillet for deep frying. Add fish pieces and fry until golden on all sides and cooked through. Remove to a paper towel lined plate to absorb excess oil. Sprinkle with a little salt.
Add onions and cook until golden and caramelized, about 10 minutes. Most of the oil will have evaporated. Add garlic and chiles. Cook for 1 more minute.
Return fish to the pan. Add lime juice and toss to combine.
Serve with lime and an extra garnish of more berbere.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Gomen Wat Recipe
recipes.description: Gomen Ethiopian Style Collard Greens is a simple Vegetarian side dish without meat but so full of flavor due to the rich and luxurious Niter Kibbeh.
instructions: In a large saucepan or pot, melt the Niter Kibbeh.
Add onion and saute on medium low heat until the onions are very soft, about 5-8 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add smoked paprika, cardamom seeds, cumin, coriander and Scotch Bonnet pepper. Cook for a few minutes to bloom the spices.
Add collard greens and give it a stir.
Cover pot and cook on medium heat for 10 minutes.
Add salt and stir to combine.

recipes.title: Azefa - Ethiopian Lentil Salad
recipes.description: Azefa - Ehiopian Lentil Salad infused with mustard seed and black pepper is a healthy and delicious vegan salad.
instructions: Bring lentils and 4 cups of water to a boil.
Reduce to a simmer and cook for 30 minutes, until lentils are just tender.
Drain immediately and run with cold water.
Using a coffee/spice grinder, grind mustard seed, black pepper and cayenne pepper to a fine powder.
Transfer the spice powder to a bowl and add boiling water. Stir to combine.
Add lemon juice and slowly drizzle in olive oil, while whisking constantly.
In a large bowl, combine lentils, bell pepper, cilantro and salt.
Add dressing and stir to combine.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Alicha Wot
recipes.description: It's been years since I worked at an Ethiopian restaurant, but this recipe for alicha wot is pretty close to what I remember making back in the day. I use venison stew meat here, but beef or lamb will work, too. This basic curry is also used with chicken, and even fish.
ingredients: 2 pounds venison stew meat, (trimmed of silverskin)
instructions: Add the onion to a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot and turn the heat to medium. Cook the onions dry, without fat, stirring often, until they soften, about 5 minutes.
Mix in the venison stew meat. Add the spiced butter and brown the meat lightly, just about 5 to 8 minutes. Add the ginger, garlic and turmeric and mix well.
Pour in about 5 cups water, enough to cover the meat by an inch or so, and simmer uncovered very gently for about 80 minutes. Add salt to taste during this time.
Add the potatoes and simmer until they are tender, about 30 minutes or so. By now the stew should have thickened a bit. Stir in as many sliced chiles as you want and serve.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Doro Wat
recipes.description: Note that most recipes for doro wat will add even more berbere than I do, but be warned: It’s hot stuff! Ideally you want an old chicken or a pheasant for this recipe. If that's not possible, use just thighs and drumsticks.
ingredients: 6 cups red onions (about 4 medium onions, sliced root to tip)
½ cup spiced butter, (ghee or regular butter)
instructions: Rub the chicken or pheasant all over with the lemon juice.
In a large, heavy pot, add the sliced onions and turn the heat to medium. Cook the onions dry, stirring frequently. They will give up their water, wilt, and eventually brown.
When the onions are close to browning, add the spiced butter, the garlic and ginger. Cook another minute or three. Add the tomato paste, berbere, black pepper, cardamom, and fenugreek. Mix well.
Add the chicken pieces and turn to coat. Cook another few minutes, until the meat turns opaque. Add some salt.

Pour in the stock and mead or wine. You want all the meat to be covered by about an inch; add water if you need to. Bring to a simmer, taste for salt, cover the pot and cook gently until the meat is tender, typically about 2 hours. The sauce should have cooked down a lot by now; add a little water if it gets thicker than gravy.

When you are about 15 minutes out from serving, stab the hard-boiled eggs all over with a fork, then add to the pot. You can either strip all the meat from the bones or leave it as-is. Add salt if needed, then serve with rice, bread or the Ethiopian crepes called injera.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Venison Stew
recipes.description: As I mention above, this recipe requires a few special ingredients. In order of importance, you need ground fenugreek, berbere spice, and then Ethiopian spiced butter. I have recipes for the latter here on Hunter Angler Gardener Cook.
ingredients: 2 large onions, peeled and sliced thin root to tip
2 to 3 tablespoons niter kebbeh (spiced butter), (or clarified butter)
1 1/2 pounds diced venison, beef, lamb or goat
6 Yukon Gold potatoes, (peeled and cut in chunks)
instructions: If you are making the Mekelesha spice mix, mix them all together in a little bowl and set aside.

Arrange the sliced onions in a large, lidded pot like a Dutch oven and turn the heat to medium. Sweat the onions, dry, until they are starting to brown and soft, about 10 minutes. You will need to stir them from time to time.
When the onions are soft, add the spiced butter and the garlic and stir well. Let this cook another 4 to 6 minutes.
Mix in the cumin, berbere, fenugreek and tomato and cook 3 minutes, stirring often. Add the diced venison.
Pour in the broth, little by little, stirring to incorporate everything well. Bring to a simmer, add salt to taste, and cover. Let this cook gently for 1 hour.
Add the potatoes, cover and cook another hour. When the venison and potatoes are tender, add the mekelesha spice, if using, adjust for salt and pepper and serve with bread or rice.

recipes.title: Tibs, Ethiopian Stir-Fried Beef or Venison
recipes.description: This dish is super easy to make, but you do need a few unusual ingredients and spices, and you need to have everything set to go before you start cooking because it comes together very fast. First, you must get yourself some Ethiopian berbere. It comes as either a spice mixture or a paste. You can buy it online or in places like Whole Foods or Cost Plus Market, or you can make it yourself. You'll also need clarified butter, although this tastes more authentic if you make your own Ethiopian spiced butter. Of the many spices listed in the ingredients, the most important is the fenugreek. It is this spice that makes the version of tibs we served at Horn of Africa different from most others.
ingredients: 1 large red onion, (about 2 cups, sliced thin)
1/4 cup niter kebbeh or ghee (spiced butter)
2 pounds venison, (lamb or beef, cut into bite-sized pieces)
2 cups whole (peeled tomatoes, broken into bits)
1 to 5 green chiles, (such as jalapenos or serranos)
instructions: Get the saute pan or wok very hot. Stir-fry the onions without the butter for a few minutes, until they char just a little on the outside. Add the spiced butter and the venison. Stir-fry hot and fast until the outside of the meat is brown but the inside of the meat is still very rare. You need to do this on as hot a burner as you have. Do it in two batches unless you have a very large wok or pan.

The moment the meat has browned, add it all back into the pan along with the spices, garlic and chiles. Stir-fry another 30 seconds or so, then add the tomatoes and the wine. Toss to combine and let this cook for a minute or two. Serve at once with bread or injera.

recipes.title: Ethiopian Butter
recipes.description: Our spiced butter, called niter kebbeh, at the Ethiopian restaurant I worked at absolutely required four things (other than butter): minced shallots, toasted cardamom, fenugreek and turmeric. Oh, and one other thing -- time. Slow cooking is essential to this concoction.
ingredients: 1 piece cinnamon stick, (about an inch long)
instructions: Toast the cardamom, cloves and cinnamon in a dry pan over medium heat until they are aromatic, about a minute.
Cut the butter into cubes.

Toss everything into a heavy pot and turn the heat on low. Let this come to a bare simmer and cook gently for at least 30 minutes. We cooked ours at least an hour. It is vital that the milk solids do not burn. If they do, you have ruined the butter. Watch for browning, and when you see it, turn off the heat.
Strain through cheesecloth and store in a clean glass jar. It'll last 6 months in the fridge, at least a week on the counter, and forever in the freezer.

recipes.title: Berbere Chicken (Delicious Ethiopian Chicken)
recipes.description: This berbere chicken recipe packs a punch and keeps your taste buds dancing - it's one of my favorite chicken recipes! Bursting with an aromatic berbere spice blend, zesty lemon, and tender chicken thighs, this dish exemplifies delicious Ethiopian flavors.
instructions: Begin by preheating your oven to 425°F.
In a medium bowl, combine olive oil, berbere spice, lemon juice, and cayenne pepper (if desired). Mix them together until you have a thick, flavorful paste.
Generously rub the berbere seasoning all over your chicken pieces.
Line a sheet pan with parchment paper and place chicken skin side down in a single layer.
Pop them into the preheated oven and bake for 18-20 minutes, ensuring they reach an internal temperature of at least 165°F.
Once perfectly cooked, let the chicken thighs rest for a few minutes.

recipes.title: Gomen Wat (Ethiopian Collard Greens)
recipes.description: Gomen Wat, also known as Ethiopian collard greens, is a traditional side dish that's a staple in many homes. Made with collard greens and a mix of seasonings, it's a flavor packed side dish that's healthy and goes with just about everything.
instructions: Add Niter Kibbeh to a pot.
When melted, add onions, garlic, and tomatoes.
Add cumin, coriander, and cardamom, and let it cook for about 5 minutes on low heat.
Add the chopped collard greens and stir.
Add salt, black pepper, paprika, and cayenne pepper.
Cook for about 20 minutes, stirring every few minutes, till the water is mostly evaporated.
Taste for salt and add more if needed.

recipes.title: Sega Wat (Ethiopian Beef Stew)
recipes.description: Sega Wat (Ethiopian Beef Stew), the heart and soul of Ethiopian cuisine, is a dish that encapsulates centuries of tradition, culture, and flavor. Imagine tender morsels of meat, bathed in a rich, aromatic sauce that's been meticulously simmered to perfection.
instructions: Heat a large pot and add the niter kibbeh.
Toss in the chopped onions, garlic, and ginger, and let them sizzle until they caramelize.
Add the berbere spice, smoked paprika, black pepper, and a pinch of salt. Stir for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the stock, along with tomato paste, to create a hearty base. Then, add the tender stew beef cubes to the pot.
Let the stew simmer gently for about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Place the boiled eggs into the simmering stew and simmer for about 10 minutes on low heat.
Taste for spices and adjust according to your preference.

recipes.title: Niter Kibbeh - Ethiopian Spiced Clarified Butter
recipes.description: Niter kibbeh (Ethiopian spiced clarified butter) is a fantastic substitute for regular butter. It has a delicious out-of-this-world flavor you will fall in love with!
instructions: Melt butter on low heat.
Add the rest of the ingredients.
Simmer for 30 minutes on low heat.
Stir every few minutes.
Sieve using a cheesecloth to remove the solids.
Store in an airtight container.

recipes.title: Almond and Banana Breakfast Drink Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy almond and banana breakfast drink recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Place all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Add extra water if you prefer a weaker mixture
Pour into a tall glass and drink

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Crepes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate peanut butter protein crepes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Whisk together egg whites, protein powder and sweetener
Coat a small skillet with nonstick spray, place over medium heat
Pour 1/6th of batter into pan, tilt to coat bottom in a very thin layer
Allow to cook 2 minutes then remove gently
Repeat until all batter is gone
In a bowl mix together yogurt and peanut powder
Place 2 tbsp of yogurt mixture into center of each crepe and roll up

recipes.title: Easy Bake Chorizo & Veggie Quiche Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy easy bake chorizo & veggie quiche recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Coat 6 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Cook chorizo, onion and shredded potato
Whisk together eggs, egg whites, cottage cheese, salt and pepper
Add meat, onion, potato and broccoli to eggs
Evenly divide among 6 cups
Bake for 40-45 minutes
Allow to cool then gently remove from mold

recipes.title: Easy Gluten-Free Buckwheat Protein Crepes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy easy gluten-free buckwheat protein crepes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 tbsp Coconut Oil in liquid form
instructions: In blender, add almond milk, cottage cheese, sea salt, eggs and egg whites, blend 45 seconds
Add buckwheat flour and blend 10 seconds
Refrigerate mixture for 45 minutes before using
After 45 minutes, add coconut oil and blend immediately
Heat nonstick skillet over medium heat
Add quarter cup batter to pan and swirl to distribute evenly
Cook until bottom is browned and can easily be flipped
Cook other side 20-30 seconds

recipes.title: Hearty Pumpkin Spice Protein Waffles Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy hearty pumpkin spice protein waffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 scoops snickerdoodle or vanilla whey protein powder
Additional Pumpkin Pie Spice as desired
instructions: Mix together all ingredients except syrup in a bowl
Allow batter to sit while waffle iron warms
Spray waffle iron with nonstick spray
Cook according to waffle iron directions

recipes.title: High Protein Blueberry Almond Pancakes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein blueberry almond pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Blend oats into a powder-like consistency
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Mix blended oats, protein powder, and baking powder
Add nonfat cottage cheese and blueberries, stir until combined
In a separate bowl, whisk eggs
Add eggs to pancake batter and gently fold in
Spoon batter onto preheated griddle to make 6 medium pancakes
Cook until middles start to bubble then flip
Cook another few minutes on the other side

recipes.title: High Protein Breakfast Banana Split Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein breakfast banana split recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Evenly divide greek yogurt into 3 separate bowls
Mix chocolate protein powder with yogurt in one bowl
Mix strawberry protein powder with yogurt in second bowl
Mix vanilla protein powder with yogurt in third bowl
Place each bowl in freezer for 20 minutes
Slice banana in half lengthwise
Remove yogurt from freezer and give each bowl a good mix
Assemble each flavor of yogurt on top of the banana
Finish off with strawberries, pineapple, whipped topping, walnuts, chocolate sauce and cherry

recipes.title: High Protein Cheeseburger Omelette Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein cheeseburger omelette recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Whisk together eggs and eggwhites
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Add eggs to skillet and cover pan with aluminum foil
Cook until desired doneness
In a second skillet, cook ground beef with salt & pepper
Spread cooked ground beef on one side of eggs
Top ground beef with tomato and pickle
Fold eggs over beef
Sprinkle with cheese
Cook until cheese is slightly melted
Finish off with ketchup and serve

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken & Waffles Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein chicken & waffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 12 oz boneless skinless chicken breast, raw
1 cup high protein Special K cereal
instructions: Add chicken breast, milk and hot sauce to a bag, shake well and refrigerate overnight
Add cereal to food processor and blend into small pieces
Put cereal, cornmeal, paprika, salt and pepper in a bag
Preheat oven to 400 degrees
Remove chicken and coat with cereal mixture
Place on parchment-lined baking sheet
Bake for 20 minutes, reduce to 350 and bake 15 more minutes until crispy
While chicken is cooking, make waffles according to package directions
Serve chicken on top of waffles

recipes.title: High Protein Chocolate Peanut Butter Pancakes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein chocolate peanut butter pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1/4 cup oat flour or whole wheat flour
instructions: Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
In a bowl mix flour, protein powder, cocoa powder, peanut flour, cinnamon, sweetener and baking powder
Add one egg yolk, milk and vanilla extract, stir until combined
In a separate bowl whisk three egg whites until stiff peaks
Gently fold egg whites into batter
Spoon batter onto preheated griddle to make about 6 medium sized pancakes
Cook until middles start to bubble then flip

recipes.title: High Protein Coconut Pomegranate Pancakes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein coconut pomegranate pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Toppings: pomegranate arils, shredded coconut, chocolate syrup
instructions: Blend oats into powder-like consistency
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Mix blended oats, protein powder, and baking powder
Mash banana and add to powder mix, stir until combined
Whisk eggs separately then gently fold into batter
Spoon batter onto griddle to make 6 medium pancakes
Cook until middles bubble then flip
Top with pomegranate seeds, shredded coconut, chocolate syrup

recipes.title: High Protein Epic Breakfast Burrito Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein epic breakfast burrito recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 4 small low carb tortillas OR 2 large low carb tortillas
1/2 cup shredded reduced fat cheddar cheese
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together eggs and egg whites
Spray a skillet with nonstick spray
Scramble eggs over medium heat until desired doneness
Dice up red pepper, green pepper and onion
Remove eggs from pan and cover
Add ground beef and taco seasoning to skillet
Cook beef until done
Lay burrito or tortilla on a plate
Layer scrambled eggs, peppers, onion, ground beef and finish with a sprinkle of cheese
Wrap up and enjoy with a side of fresh fruit!

recipes.title: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy joe ohrablo's protein oatmeal pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
instructions: Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

recipes.title: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy kurt weidner's sweet potato waffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

recipes.title: Low Carb Berry Cobbler Crumble Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low carb berry cobbler crumble recipe from Muscle & Strength.

Put berries in a cast iron skillet or oven safe dish
Bake for 15 minutes
While berries are baking, mix together almond flour, protein powder and 1 tbsp melted coconut oil until crumbly
After 15 minutes, remove berries from oven and top with crumble mixture

Serve topped with whipped cream or greek yogurt

recipes.title: Low Carb Pancakes With Raspberries Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low carb pancakes with raspberries recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Mix egg whites and almond flour together
Heat coconut oil in skillet
Pour half of batter into skillet and cook until brown around edges then flip
Cook other side until brown
Repeat with remaining batter
Serve with raspberries

recipes.title: Low Carb, High Protein Breakfast Pizza Eggs Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low carb, high protein breakfast pizza eggs recipe from Muscle & Strength.

Whisk together egg, egg whites, zucchini, coconut flour and pizza seasoning
Pour mixture into pan and set over medium heat
Cover pan and cook until eggs are set and edges become slightly golden
Top with pasta sauce and grated cheese

recipes.title: Monster Mass Turbo Bulking Oatmeal Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy monster mass turbo bulking oatmeal recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 4 scoops Monster Mass protein powder, favorite flavor

Once heated, stir and let stand 1-2 minutes
Stir in Monster Mass protein and 1 cup of milk
Add 1-3 scoops of instant coffee grounds
Add additional milk if needed for desired consistency
Optional: top with sliced strawberries or banana

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe

Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

recipes.title: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy protein pumpkin pancakes with oats recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
instructions: Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

recipes.title: Red Velvet Protein Pancakes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy red velvet protein pancakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 scoops red velvet or chocolate protein powder
Cream Cheese Frosting: 4 tbsp Greek yogurt cream cheese, 1/4 cup nonfat Greek yogurt, 1 scoop vanilla protein powder, sweetener to taste
instructions: Mix together all frosting ingredients and place in refrigerator
Whisk together dry ingredients: oat flour, protein powder, baking powder, cocoa powder, salt
Whisk together wet ingredients: egg whites, greek yogurt, vanilla, sweetener
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Set nonstick skillet over medium heat
Drop pancake batter into pan in desired size
Allow to cook until small bubbles form on top
Flip and cook additional 1-2 minutes
Repeat until all batter is gone
Remove frosting from refrigerator and layer pancakes with cream cheese mixture

recipes.title: Scrambled Eggs With Cheese Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy scrambled eggs with cheese recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 30 grams of shredded low fat mozzarella cheese
instructions: Whisk whole eggs and egg whites in a large mixing bowl
In a small frying pan cook onion and mushrooms until soft
Remove onions and mushrooms and add to the egg mix
Add all other ingredients except shredded cheese
Mix ingredients then add to moderately heated frying pan with olive oil
Stir gently to scramble the eggs
Cook until eggs are done to your liking
Serve on a large plate and sprinkle shredded cheese over the top

recipes.title: Snickerdoodle Pecan Protein French Toast Sticks
recipes.description: Recipes Breakfast Snacks High Protein Vegetarian
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Cut each slice of bread into thirds.
Whisk together egg whites, milk, protein powder.
Coat each slice of bread in the egg mixture.
Bake for 9 minutes, flip, bake 9 more minutes.

recipes.title: Spicy Scrambled Eggs Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy spicy scrambled eggs recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 large whole eggs and 4 egg whites
instructions: Spray a small non-stick frying pan with olive oil cooking spray
Whisk eggs, onion, garlic, chilli, cottage cheese and herbs together in a bowl
Add to moderately heated frying pan and gently stir to scramble
Serve on toast

recipes.title: Sundried Tomato & Herb Scrambled Egg Grilled Cheese Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy sundried tomato & herb scrambled egg grilled cheese recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 tbsp chopped Sun Dried Tomato (not in oil)
2 slices Ezekiel Bread or bread of choice
instructions: Whisk together egg, egg whites, salt and pepper
Add in sun dried tomatoes
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Scramble eggs until cooked through
Place eggs onto 1 slice of bread
Top with cheese
Place sandwich into skillet and cook until golden
Flip and cook until cheese is melted

recipes.title: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy beef chop suey recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

recipes.title: Bodybuilders Lean Beef Enchiladas Recipes
recipes.description: A healthy bodybuilders lean beef enchiladas recipes from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
In a skillet over medium heat, saute ground beef until cooked
Add diced chiles, salt and pepper
Transfer meat to a bowl and add in beans
Spread half the enchilada sauce on bottom of an oven safe dish
Divide the meat and bean mixture evenly down the middle of the 3 tortillas
Sprinkle with half the cheese
Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes

recipes.title: High Protein Sriracha Chicken Cheese Fries Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein sriracha chicken cheese fries recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 4 medium white or sweet potatoes, cut as desired
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Coat oven safe pan with nonstick spray
Add potato slices to pan
Bake for approximately 20 minutes
While potatoes are baking, boil chicken until cooked through
Shred cooked chicken
Toss chicken with sriracha sauce
Remove fries from oven
Top with shredded chicken and cheese
Place back in oven about 6-7 minutes until cheese melts
Top with chives if desired

recipes.title: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy homemade high protein white cheddar mac & cheese recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

recipes.title: Protein Packed Sweet Potato Shepherds Pie
recipes.description: A healthy protein packed sweet potato shepherds pie from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Add ground beef to a non stick skillet
Cook over medium heat
Once cooked, add in tomato paste, frozen veggies and seasonings as desired
Place mixture into a 9x13in oven safe dish
Spread mashed sweet potatoes over top
Sprinkle with paprika, if desired
Bake for approximately 35-40 minutes
Serve immediately

recipes.title: Bodybuilder's Double Beef & Bacon Cheeseburger Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy bodybuilder's double beef & bacon cheeseburger recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 slice Reduced Fat White Cheddar Cheese
instructions: Combine ground beef and liquid smoke
Form beef into two even sized patties
Grill until about 1 minute before desired doneness
Add half slice of cheese to each burger and allow to melt
Cook bacon as desired
Place one burger on bottom of roll, followed by bacon, then remaining burger
Add condiments such as lettuce, tomato, ketchup, mustard, relish if desired

recipes.title: Bodybuilders' Steak & Grilled Cheese Sandwich Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy bodybuilders' steak & grilled cheese sandwich recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 slices reduced fat pepper jack cheese
8 oz thinly sliced sirloin tip steak
instructions: Season meat and cook as desired
Add peppers and onions to medium skillet and cook until tender
Layer steak, veggies and cheese onto bread
Top with additional bread slice
Heat medium skillet or grill pan over medium heat
Add sandwich to pan and toast until golden
Flip and toast until cheese is fully melted

recipes.title: Cheesy Baked Eggplant Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy cheesy baked eggplant recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Oregano, Italian seasoning, basil, thyme to taste
instructions: Peel and cut eggplant into slices
Liberally apply salt. Let sit 30 minutes
Soak up liquid with paper towel. Rinse thoroughly
Cut slices into quarters
Place one layer in bottom of 9x13 baking pan
Cover with half can diced tomato and one can tomato sauce
Place cheese slices over layer. Season as desired. Repeat
Bake at 350 for 45 minutes or until eggplant is as desired

recipes.title: Crock Pot Turkey Meat Balls With Green Peppers Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy crock pot turkey meat balls with green peppers recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Cajun seasoning, black pepper, garlic salt to taste
instructions: Cook cauliflower in microwave until very tender, chop into fine pieces and set aside
Thaw green peppers in microwave and set aside
Mix turkey, eggs, coconut flour, Worcestershire sauce, pepper and seasonings
Roll meatballs about the size of a golf ball
Cover bottom of crock pot with meatballs, layer green peppers and cauliflower on them
Continue layering meatballs and pepper and cauliflower mix
Chop cranberry sauce and distribute over meatballs, pour chili sauce over everything
Cover and cook on high for 6-7 hours

recipes.title: Damien's Cheap Chili Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy damien's cheap chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Finely chop garlic, cut onions into slivers and finely chop red pepper
Cook all meat in large deep saucepan until dark brown, stirring constantly
Move meat to large deep pot, add olive oil, garlic and onion, cook until onion is soft
Add can of chopped tomatoes and salsa and simmer 10 minutes until sauce thickens
Add finely chopped peppers and can of corn kernels
Add chili powder to taste and simmer 20-50 mins

recipes.title: Deep Dish Pepperoni Pizza Lasagna Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy deep dish pepperoni pizza lasagna recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Combine cottage cheese, eggs, and pizza seasoning in a bowl, mix until creamy and smooth
Spread 1/4 cup pizza sauce on bottom of 9x13 baking dish
Layer 3 noodles on top of sauce
Evenly spread 1/3 of cottage cheese mixture on noodles
Spread sauce on top, sprinkle 1/4 of shredded cheese, layer 1/3 ground turkey and 1/3 pepperoni
Repeat layers two more times
Finish with remaining mozzarella
Cover and bake for 30 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly

recipes.title: Grill Healthy: Spicy Sriracha Lean Beef Burger Recipe
recipes.description: Recipes Dinner BBQ/Grill High Protein
ingredients: 1 tbsp favorite no salt grill seasoning
instructions: Combine ground beef and grill seasoning.
Cook on grill until desired doneness.
Mix together Greek yogurt and Sriracha.
Spread yogurt mixture onto rolls.
Layer burger and add toppings.

recipes.title: Grilled Sausage and Turkey Flatbread Pizza Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy grilled sausage and turkey flatbread pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 0.25 cup assorted colored bell peppers, sliced
instructions: Heat grill to around 300 degrees
Place each flatbread top side down and grill until crispy
While bread is grilling, cook ground turkey breast in a skillet until cooked through
Once bread is crispy, flip over and top each flatbread with half the sauce, ground turkey, sausage, bell peppers and cheese
Close grill cover and continue to grill until cheese is melted
Enjoy right away!

recipes.title: Half Pound Teriyaki Turkey Burger Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy half pound teriyaki turkey burger recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Mix together ground turkey breast and 2 tablespoons teriyaki sauce
Heat grill to medium
Place burgers on hot grill
Grill for about 7-9 minutes depending on desired temperature
Flip and cook an additional 7-9 minutes
While burgers cook on second side, place pineapple rings on grill and cook 2 minutes each side
Layer roll with lettuce, turkey burger, additional 1 tablespoon teriyaki sauce per burger and grilled pineapple

recipes.title: Healthy Chili Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy healthy chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 lbs lean ground beef (80%) or turkey
instructions: Brown ground beef or turkey
Place meat in soup kettle with all ingredients
Season with salt and pepper
Optional additions: diced jalapenos, green chilies, ranch dressing seasoning packet, or salsa
If chili is too thick, add water as needed
Cook until thoroughly heated

recipes.title: High Protein Balsamic Steak & Pasta Salad Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein balsamic steak & pasta salad recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 8oz high protein pasta (Banza), cooked and drained
Garlic powder, salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Slice steak into thin strips and grill until desired doneness
Toss together cooked pasta, asparagus, tomato, balsamic, and seasonings
Add in cooked steak and goat cheese
Toss gently
Serve immediately or store in a sealed container

recipes.title: High Protein Cheesy Meatball Sub Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein cheesy meatball sub recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees
Mix together all meatball ingredients
Shape into desired size meatballs
Bake on lined baking sheet for approximately 13 minutes or until juices run clear
Spread pasta sauce on bottom and top of sub roll
Place meatballs in roll
Top with cheese
Place back in oven to melt cheese

recipes.title: High Protein Cheesy Steak Pizza Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein cheesy steak pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 cup reduced fat shredded mozzarella cheese
instructions: Slice steak into thin strips and grill or saute until desired doneness
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place pizza crust on top
Top crust with pizza sauce, half the cheese, peppers, onions, and grilled steak
Finish with remaining cheese
Bake for about 15 minutes until golden and bubbly
Allow to cool slightly, slice and serve

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein chicken burrito bowl recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1/3 cup no salt added black beans
1/2 cup fresh pico de gallo or salsa
instructions: Toss cooked white rice with chopped cilantro, squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of salt
Toss chicken breast with your favorite Mexican seasoning and bake or grill as desired
Once chicken is done cooking, cut into bite size pieces
Warm your black beans in the microwave
Build your bowl - divide all ingredients between 2 bowls
Layer cilantro lime rice, shredded lettuce, chicken, beans, guacamole, pico de gallo, greek yogurt
Finish off with a sprinkle of cheddar cheese and a wedge of lime

recipes.title: High-Protein Chicken & Peanut Black Bean Pasta Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high-protein chicken & peanut black bean pasta recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl
Heat in microwave for 30-45 seconds and mix well
Cook pasta according to directions
Toss cooked pasta, bean sprouts, shredded chicken, and sauce together
Evenly divide between 2 plates
Top with roasted peanuts and fresh chives if desired

recipes.title: High-Protein Grilled Chicken Gyros Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high-protein grilled chicken gyros recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 24 oz chicken breast, cut into cubes
Tzatziki Sauce: 0.5 cup nonfat Greek yogurt, 0.5 tsp dry dill, splash of lemon juice, salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Mix together all Tzatziki sauce ingredients and place in refrigerator
Add chicken, olive oil, vinegar, garlic powder, lemon juice, and oregano to a bag, toss and marinate 2-3 hours or overnight
Remove chicken from container and grill until cooked through
Evenly divide chicken between 8 pitas
Top with tomato, cucumber, onion, and tzatziki sauce

recipes.title: Homemade High Protein Spinach & Chicken Pizza Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy homemade high protein spinach & chicken pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 10 oz cooked and shredded chicken breast
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F
Bring water and chicken stock to a low boil
Slowly add in cornmeal (add slowly to prevent clumping)
Allow to simmer for several minutes while it thickens
Mix in grated parmesan
Remove from stove and allow to cool slightly
Grease a 9 inch spring form pan or pie dish
Evenly spread cornmeal into dish
Bake at 400 degrees for 10-12 minutes until slightly firm
Remove and add toppings: sauce, spinach, chicken and cheese
Bake an additional 10 minutes until cheese is melted and crust is golden

recipes.title: Lentil Beans (Indian style) - aka Dhal Soup Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy lentil beans (indian style) - aka dhal soup recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan and add garlic and onion for 2 minutes while stirring
Add the spices and stir
Put in tomatoes, red lentils, lemon juice, vegetable stock and coconut milk
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are cooked
Season with salt and pepper
Add cilantro and additional lemon juice to add more flavor

recipes.title: Low-Fat, High-Protein Vegetarian BBQ Cobb Salad Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low-fat, high-protein vegetarian bbq cobb salad recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 0.5 cup low-sodium black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Cook TVP according to package directions
Mix TVP with BBQ sauce
Add lettuce and veggies to salad bowl
Top with TVP and BBQ mixture
Top with salad dressing of choice or additional BBQ sauce

recipes.title: Madras Chicken & Broccoli Skewers With Sweet Potato Fries Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy madras chicken & broccoli skewers with sweet potato fries recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 lbs chicken breast, cut into chunks
4 medium sweet potatoes, cut into wedges
instructions: Combine chicken, broccoli and Madras seasoning in a bowl
Cover and allow to sit for 20 minutes in refrigerator
While meat is marinating, heat up grill and season sweet potato wedges with paprika
Thread chicken cubes and broccoli onto skewers
Place skewers and sweet potatoes on grill
Cook skewers until chicken is cooked through and sweet potatoes are tender

recipes.title: Mediterranean Rice Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy mediterranean rice recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Boil basmati rice for approximately 15-20 minutes
Add rice to bowl
Cut up red onion into strips and add to rice
Drain tuna and add to rice
Cut avocado into small squares and add to rice
Squeeze lemon juice over rice
Add salt and pepper if desired

recipes.title: Protein Packed Grilled Steak Burrito Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy protein packed grilled steak burrito recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 0.5 cup no salt black beans, drained
instructions: Season steak with salt and pepper
Grill steak until desired doneness
Cook brown rice according to package directions
When rice is done, add in pico de gallo and black beans
Layer bean and rice mixture down center of tortilla
Top with sliced steak
Finish off with a dollop of greek yogurt and cheese or avocado if desired
Roll up and enjoy

recipes.title: Protein Packed Lean Gains BBQ Sloppy Joe Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy protein packed lean gains bbq sloppy joe recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 0.5 cup crushed tomatoes or pasta sauce
instructions: Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Saute onion, ground beef and turkey until almost cooked through
Add in crushed tomatoes and seasonings
Cook an additional 2 minutes
Serve over roll of choice

recipes.title: Protein-Packed Smoky Bison Chili Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy protein-packed smoky bison chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 lb ground bison (can sub ground beef or turkey)
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 to 0.75 cup water or beef broth
instructions: Coat bottom of large pot with oil or nonstick spray
Saute chopped onion, garlic, and bacon for 2 minutes until onion becomes slightly translucent
Add in bison and cook 3-4 minutes
Add in fire roasted tomatoes, tomato sauce and all seasonings
Simmer 2-3 minutes
Stir in unflavored protein powder
Mix in kidney beans
Add water or broth until desired thickness
Add in liquid smoke
Allow to simmer 30 minutes
Serve topped with Greek yogurt, shredded cheddar and fresh chives

recipes.title: Shaun's Chili Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy shaun's chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Chop and cook the onions in some oil for 10 minutes
Brown the meat in batches in a separate pan
When all the meat is done add to a very large pan with the onions
Add in tomatoes, mushrooms, a good amount of puree, kidney beans and chili powder to taste
Reduce heat and leave for a couple hours
Allow to cool then bag up and freeze
Heat in microwave 3 minutes when ready to eat

recipes.title: Smokey Grilled Cheddar And Chipotle Burger Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy smokey grilled cheddar and chipotle burger recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Mix beef with salt, pepper, chipotle powder and coffee. Form into 8 patties. Grill until cooked, top with cheese. Serve in bun with onion and BBQ sauce.

recipes.title: Spicy Garlic Bok Choy Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy spicy garlic bok choy recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Combine everything but the bok choy in a large mixing bowl and whisk
Dredge the bok choy through the sauce and place it into a large baking pan
Spoon any excess sauce over the bok choy in the pan
Bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees and enjoy

recipes.title: Summer BBQ Pulled Pork & Coleslaw Sandwiches Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy summer bbq pulled pork & coleslaw sandwiches recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Cook pork with BBQ sauce until tender.
Combine coleslaw, greek yogurt, mustard, salt & pepper.
Divide pork among 4 rolls.
Top with coleslaw and serve warm.

recipes.title: The Perfect Curry Tuna Melt (With Jicama Fries!) Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy the perfect curry tuna melt (with jicama fries!) recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Jicama Fries: 1 cup jicama peeled and cut, 2 tsp oil, Cajun seasoning
instructions: Preheat oven to 425
Toss together jicama, oil and seasoning
Spread on baking sheet and bake 20 minutes, toss, bake another 20 minutes until golden
While fries bake, mix together tuna, yogurt, curry spice and chives
Divide tuna evenly between 2 slices of bread
Place a slice of cheese on top of each sandwich
Top with additional slice of bread
Place in oven with fries for last 3 minutes until cheese is melted
Divide fries evenly and serve each with one sandwich

recipes.title: Tuna, Avocado and Tomato Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy tuna, avocado and tomato recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 150g pre-cooked cannellini or lima beans, rinsed and drained
instructions: Brush tuna steak with olive oil and grill or dry-fry about 3 mins on each side until outside is golden but inside still pink
Steam or microwave asparagus tips until just tender
Halve tomatoes, squeeze out pips then chop roughly
Arrange beans on serving plates with tomato, asparagus, and onion
Peel and slice avocado, add to plates
Mix together oil, lemon juice, most of oregano and seasoning
Pour most of dressing over salad, slice tuna and add
Drizzle remaining dressing and garnish with rest of oregano

recipes.title: 3 Ingredient Chocolate Protein Mug Cake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy 3 ingredient chocolate protein mug cake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1/2 tsp baking powder for oven option
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a large mug. Do not fill to the lid as it might spill over
Microwave for 1-2 minutes
Let cool before removing and enjoy

recipes.title: Amoretti Easy Banana Nut Protein Shake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy amoretti easy banana nut protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 8-12 oz unsweetened soy or cashew milk
1 scoop vegan or whey protein powder
instructions: Add all ingredients to blender in order listed
Blend until smooth
Drink and enjoy

recipes.title: Antoine Vaillant's Anabolic Tropic Protein Shake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy antoine vaillant's anabolic tropic protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 3.5 scoops weight gainer protein powder (Real Gains or similar)
instructions: Add coconut water into blender
Add a fistful each of mangos and strawberries, and one banana
Add ice liberally
Add 3.5 scoops of weight gainer protein powder
Blend until smooth
Sip slowly and enjoy

recipes.title: Baked Apple Cider Pronuts (Protein Donuts) Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy baked apple cider pronuts (protein donuts) recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 330 degrees.
Mix dry and wet ingredients together.
Divide batter between 6 donut molds.
Bake for ~12 minutes.

recipes.title: Baked Spinach, Mushroom & Gouda Quiche Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy baked spinach, mushroom & gouda quiche recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 cup (112g) shredded gouda or cheese of choice
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Spray 6 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Mix together all ingredients
Evenly divide mixture among 6 muffin cups
Bake for approximately 40 minutes or until golden
Allow to cool before removing (they will continue to set)

recipes.title: Banana And Oats Protein Shake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy banana and oats protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Chose your favorite protein powder flavor
Combine all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth

recipes.title: Banana Chocolate Chip Protein Bars Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy banana chocolate chip protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Sift together protein powder and coconut flour
Add in vanilla extract, stevia and almond milk
Mix until a dough is formed
Mix in chocolate chips
Evenly divide dough and shape into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container

recipes.title: Banana Walnut Protein Bars Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy banana walnut protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: In a large bowl, add all dry ingredients (oats, protein, walnuts, cinnamon) and stir
In a separate bowl, mash bananas and add egg whites and vanilla and stir
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and combine until evenly mixed
Scoop mixture into a 9x9 Pyrex dish
Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes
Allow to cool before cutting

recipes.title: Blueberry Mug Cake Recipe With FitMiss Vanilla Chai
recipes.description: A healthy blueberry mug cake recipe with fitmiss vanilla chai from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Blend all ingredients except blueberries until smooth.
Spray a bowl with non-stick oil, pour in batter.
Stir in blueberries.
Microwave for 2 minutes.
Pour frosting over cake.

recipes.title: Braised Beef Blumenberg With Mushrooms And Cauliflower Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy braised beef blumenberg with mushrooms and cauliflower recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: In a large heavy stew pot add coconut oil, heat on high
Brown beef in batches until all liquid has evaporated and drippings look very dark and caramelized
Return all browned beef to pan, add onions and celery, cook until onions turn transparent
Add water to cover the beef
Add mushrooms and cauliflower cut into chunks
Season with Lawry's salt and pepper
Add enough water to just cover all ingredients
Bring to a boil then cover and turn heat to low
Cook covered for approximately 1.5 hours until liquid is reduced and meat is tender

recipes.title: Chocolate And Peanut Butter Protein Bars Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate and peanut butter protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Place oats in blender and pulse until flour-like texture
Mix oat flour, cinnamon and chocolate whey protein in a bowl
Add peanut butter and mix thoroughly
Mash bananas and add with honey and egg whites, mix well
Add skim milk and mix again
Pour batter into greased 9x9 or 9x13 baking pan
Bake 15-20 minutes until toothpick comes out clean
Allow to cool and cut into 6 bars

recipes.title: Chocolate Caramel And Coffee Protein Shake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate caramel and coffee protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Place 8 ounces of brewed coffee and 8 ounces of milk into a shaker cup
Add 2 tablespoons of caramel creamer
Add 2 scoops of chocolate whey protein powder
Shake well and drink

recipes.title: Chocolate High Protein Pudding Pie Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate high protein pudding pie recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 small box sugar free instant chocolate pudding
1 reduced fat graham cracker pie crust
instructions: Combine pudding mix, protein powder and Greek yogurt in a mixing bowl
Mix with an electric hand mixer
Evenly spread into pie crust
Refrigerate for 4-6 hours or overnight
Finish off with whipped topping if desired

recipes.title: Chocolate Oat Kaged Muscle Kasein Protein Bars
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate oat kaged muscle kasein protein bars from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 scoop Kaged Muscle Kasein vanilla protein powder
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together rolled oats and casein protein powder, set aside
In a medium pan, melt together coconut oil, cocoa powder, and coconut sugar on low heat
Once melted, pour into dry mixture bowl and add vanilla extract and almond milk, mix well
Line a 6x8 inch baking pan with parchment paper
Transfer mixture to pan then place in refrigerator to cool
Remove from refrigerator and cut into 10 squares

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cup Protein Mugcake
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate peanut butter cup protein mugcake from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 scoop peanut butter cup protein powder
6 tbsp pumpkin puree or Greek yogurt or applesauce or mashed banana
instructions: Mix flour, protein powder, cocoa powder, sweetener and baking powder
Add egg, pumpkin puree and milk to bowl and gently mix until well combined
Spray a large mug with cooking spray and pour batter into mug
Microwave for 2 minutes, cooking time may vary
Top cake with natural peanut butter, mini peanut butter cup and mini chocolate chips

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Kaged Muscle Kasein Balls
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate peanut butter kaged muscle kasein balls from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 cups pitted packed soft Medjool dates
1 scoop Kaged Muscle Kasein chocolate protein powder
Chocolate Coating: 1 cup unsweetened dark chocolate finely chopped, 1.5 tbsp coconut oil
Peanut Butter Drizzle: 3 tbsp natural peanut butter, 1 tbsp coconut oil, 0.5 tbsp maple syrup
instructions: Process dates in food processor until smooth. Add peanut butter, vanilla, protein powder and salt, process 30 seconds
Transfer mixture to freezer for 30 minutes to set
Remove from freezer, scoop tablespoons of mixture, roll into 1-inch balls, place on lined baking sheet
Freeze balls 15 minutes to set
Melt chocolate and coconut oil in a double boiler until smooth
Spoon tablespoon of chocolate mixture over each ball, freeze 15 minutes
Whisk peanut butter, coconut oil and maple syrup in double boiler until smooth
Drizzle balls with peanut butter mixture and serve

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Bark Recipe
recipes.description: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian
ingredients: 1 scoop peanut butter marshmallow protein powder
instructions: Add all ingredients except chocolate peanut butter to a blender.
Mix well.
Spread on parchment paper.
Drizzle peanut butter on top.
Freeze overnight.
Break into pieces.

recipes.title: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Granola Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy chocolate peanut butter protein granola recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Mix dry ingredients then add wet ingredients.
Spread onto baking sheet.
Bake for 12 minutes, stir, bake 10 more minutes.
Allow to cool and store in sealed container.

recipes.title: Cinnamon Chip Caramel Protein Bars Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy cinnamon chip caramel protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 4 scoops vanilla caramel whey protein powder
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line a 9x13 inch pan with parchment paper
Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl (protein, oats, cinnamon and salt)
Mix together all wet ingredients (milk, almond butter, honey and extract)
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Stir in cinnamon chips
Pour into baking dish
Bake for approximately 15 minutes
Remove from oven and allow to cool (bars will finish setting)
Slice into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container
