recipes.title: Cookies And Cream High Calorie Bulking Milkshake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy cookies and cream high calorie bulking milkshake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 scoops cookies and cream protein powder
instructions: Make whipped topping: whip 8 oz heavy cream until soft peaks form, fold in crumbled Oreo
Store whipped topping mixture (use as 4 servings)
For the shake: place 12 oz whole milk in shaker
Add 2 oz heavy cream and 2 scoops cookies and cream protein powder
Shake well and top with whipped cream topping

recipes.title: Crustless Low-Carb Protein Pumpkin Pie Recipe
recipes.description: Recipes Snacks High Protein Low Carb
instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
Spray a pie dish with nonstick spray.
Add all ingredients to a bowl and mix well.
Bake for ~45-50 minutes or until just set.
Place in refrigerator to set for 4-6 hours.

recipes.title: Delicious & Easy Café Cream Protein Truffles Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy delicious & easy café cream protein truffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2/3 Scoop Nutriforce Sports Cafe Cream Protein
3 tbsp. Sweet Spreads Chocolate Brownie Coconutter
instructions: Mix all ingredients except CocoNutter.
Shape into truffle bites.
Roll each truffle into melted CocoNutter.
Refrigerate for about 1 hour.

recipes.title: Double Chocolate Protein Avocado Brownies Recipe
recipes.description: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian
ingredients: 1 scoop Kaged Muscle Kasein protein powder
instructions: Line an 8 x 8 pan with parchment paper, spray, and preheat oven to 350F.
Melt 2 oz of the dark chocolate in microwave.
In food processor, add the avocados, coconut sugar, instant coffee, and vanilla extract. Process until smooth.
Add the eggs and mix until smooth.
Bake at 350F for 30-35 minutes.

recipes.title: Easy Chocolate Protein Brownie Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy easy chocolate protein brownie recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 0.5 scoop chocolate mass gainer protein powder
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F and grease a muffin pan
Melt butter in microwave-safe bowl until entirely melted, do not overheat
Gradually stir coconut sugar into melted butter until very smooth
Crack eggs one at a time into mixture while vigorously stirring until smooth
Gradually add cocoa powder, protein powder and almond flour, constantly stirring
Pour brownie batter evenly into muffin pan (approximately 9 brownies)
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until top layer starts to crack
Remove from oven, place on cooling rack and allow to cool

recipes.title: Game Day Buffalo Chicken Sliders Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy game day buffalo chicken sliders recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breast, cooked and shredded
1/4 cup reduced fat blue cheese dressing
instructions: Combine shredded chicken, wing sauce and ranch seasoning in mixing bowl and toss until coated
Place a small lettuce leaf on each roll
Top with shredded buffalo chicken
Finish off with a drizzle of blue cheese dressing

recipes.title: Grilled Chipotle Salmon with Black Beans & Mango Salsa Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy grilled chipotle salmon with black beans & mango salsa recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 4 pieces coho salmon fillets approximately 1.5 lbs total
instructions: Mix together honey and lime juice
Spread honey evenly between 4 fillets
Sprinkle with chipotle seasoning as desired
Grill salmon until cooked and flaky
Toss together black beans and salsa
Evenly divide over 4 fillets
Serve warm

recipes.title: Grilled Chipotle Shrimp Tacos With Cilantro Avocado Dressing Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy grilled chipotle shrimp tacos with cilantro avocado dressing recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Heat grill to around 300 degrees
Spray grill with nonstick spray or toss shrimp with 0.5 tbsp olive oil
Place shrimp on the grill and cook for about 3 minutes
Flip shrimp and cook an additional 2-3 minutes or until pink in color
When shrimp are done cooking, season with chipotle seasoning
Evenly divide chopped cabbage, shrimp, avocado and dressing among 8 corn tortillas

recipes.title: Grilled Lime Garlic Fiesta Shrimp Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy grilled lime garlic fiesta shrimp recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Whisk lime juice, garlic oil, lime zest, oregano and salt together
Add shrimp and toss to coat
Cover and chill for 20 minutes
Spray pan with nonstick spray and grill shrimp until pink and cooked through

recipes.title: Grilled Skirt Steak And Poblano Fajitas Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy grilled skirt steak and poblano fajitas recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Core and mash avocados, add 0.75 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp pepper, cilantro and 2 tbsp lime juice to make guacamole
Brush onion and peppers with 2 tsp olive oil
Coat steak with remaining 1 tsp olive oil and spice rub (ancho chile, cumin, salt, pepper)
Grill poblano peppers and onion 8-10 minutes, turning often
Grill steak 2-3 minutes per side for medium rare
Let steak rest under foil while slicing onion and peeling and slicing peppers
Toss onion and pepper with 1 tbsp lime juice and 0.25 tsp salt
Slice steak and serve with veggies, guacamole, hot sauce and corn tortillas

recipes.title: Grilled Tilapia Tacos With Pico De Gallo Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy grilled tilapia tacos with pico de gallo recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Chop tomatoes and toss in a bowl with minced jalapeno, cilantro and onion. Add juice of one lime and salt. This is your pico de gallo - refrigerate
Combine juice of one lime, salt, pepper and olive oil in a bowl and whisk. Marinade tilapia 15-20 minutes maximum
Mix reduced fat sour cream, cilantro and juice of another lime for cream sauce - refrigerate
Grill tilapia until cooked through
Allow tilapia to cool then slice
Place in tortilla, add sour cream mixture, top with pico de gallo
Add hot sauce if desired

recipes.title: Healthy Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Brownies Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy healthy chocolate peanut butter protein brownies recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Frosting: 1 cup Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp peanut butter flavored protein powder, sweetener if desired
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line an 8x8 baking pan with parchment paper
Combine all brownie ingredients
Pour batter into pan
Bake for approximately 25 minutes (do not overbake)
Remove brownies from oven and allow to cool
While brownies are cooling, mix together all frosting ingredients
Once brownies are fully cooled, frost
Drizzle with chocolate peanut butter

recipes.title: Healthy High Protein Chicken Parmesan Meatloaf Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy healthy high protein chicken parmesan meatloaf recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 lb ground chicken breast or turkey
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
In a large bowl combine ground chicken, onion, garlic, egg, oats, 1/4 cup pasta sauce, Italian seasoning, salt and pepper
Mix until combined
Shape mixture into a loaf shape and place on lined baking sheet
Bake for approximately 45 minutes
Remove from oven
Top with remaining pasta sauce and mozzarella cheese
Put back in oven until cheese is melted
Allow to sit 10 minutes then serve

recipes.title: Healthy High Protein Cinnamon Coffee Cake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy healthy high protein cinnamon coffee cake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 scoop Muscle Gauge Nutrition Cinnamon Whey Isolate
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 F. Blend all ingredients together. Pour into 2 greased ramekins. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. Bake for 20-25 minutes.

recipes.title: Healthy High Protein Jumbo Apple Muffin Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy healthy high protein jumbo apple muffin recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Liquid Egg Whites (enough to make a thin batter, about 0.5-0.75 cup)
instructions: Mix everything except apple in microwave safe bowl
Let stand for a couple minutes so coconut flour absorbs moisture
Stir then add the apple
Stir again and microwave for 8-9 minutes

recipes.title: Healthy Low Cal Lasagna Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy healthy low cal lasagna recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Cook ground beef until brown
Boil noodles as directed by package
Spray a 9x13 pan with cooking spray and spread a few tablespoons of sauce on the bottom
Mix all ingredients except mozzarella cheese
Lay down half the noodles and top with half the cottage cheese mixture
Layer with the rest of the noodles and top with the other half of the mixture
Put fat free mozzarella cheese on top
Bake at 350F for 35-40 minutes

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken Caeser Wraps Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein chicken caeser wraps recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Combine yogurt, mustard, cooked garlic clove and anchovy paste for dressing
Toss and coat romaine lettuce and cucumbers with dressing
Split coated greens into 2 portions and place into tortillas
Add approximately 1.5 oz chicken per tortilla
Wrap up and enjoy

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken Meatballs Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein chicken meatballs recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Start by putting the pan on medium heat and grease lightly so meatballs don't stick
Grate or chop the onion finely
In a large bowl, mix grated onion with rest of ingredients
Make small balls out of the mixture using a spoon to get consistent size (wet hands with cold water keeps mixture from sticking)
Fry the balls until golden brown, cut one ball open to check they are cooked through

recipes.title: High Protein Chipotle Cheddar Vegetarian Quesadilla Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein chipotle cheddar vegetarian quesadilla recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Add sliced pepper, onion and mushroom to grill pan and grill until tender
Mix together cottage cheese and chipotle seasoning
Lay tortilla flat on grill
Spread half with cottage cheese mixture, add veggies, then top with cheddar cheese
Cook opened with grill cover down for 2 minutes
Fold tortilla over and flip gently
Cook another 1-2 minutes until cheese is melted
Slice and serve with salsa

recipes.title: High Protein Fruit & Yogurt Squares Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein fruit & yogurt squares recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Place fruit into separate bowls and microwave each for 90 seconds
Add 0.5 cup Greek yogurt, 1 tsp honey and half a scoop of protein into each bowl and stir
Line a baking tray with parchment paper and layer the mixture on
Top with shredded coconut and cover with cling film
Freeze for 2 hours and enjoy immediately or store in freezer

recipes.title: High Protein Grilled Chili Cheese Fries Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein grilled chili cheese fries recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Heat grill to medium heat
Layer 3-4 thick pieces of tin foil on top of one another
Place fries in center of foil, top with chili and cheddar cheese
Grill over medium heat with lid closed for about 25-30 minutes until fries are golden and cheese is melted
Serve with 6 forks and enjoy!

recipes.title: High Protein Strawberry Shortcake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein strawberry shortcake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Spray 4 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Whisk together dry ingredients: oat flour, protein powder and baking soda
Add in egg whites and sweetener if using
Allow batter to sit for 5 minutes
Evenly divide batter between 4 muffin cups
Bake for about 7 minutes
While shortcakes are baking, dice strawberries
When shortcakes are done, allow to cool 5 minutes
Using a knife, cut the top off the muffin and scoop out a bit of the middle to create a cup shape
Fill cake with Greek yogurt and top with strawberries and whipped cream if desired

recipes.title: High Protein Tuna Bake Pasta Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy high protein tuna bake pasta recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Boil pasta on medium temperature for 10 mins
Empty both cans of tuna into a large bowl and add spinach, sweetcorn, broccoli and mushrooms, mix well with garlic and herbs
Add drained pasta to bowl and mix again
Add contents of bowl into a level ovenproof dish
Add cheese and black pepper on top
Bake for 15-20 mins in the oven at 200 degrees celsius
Remove from oven when golden color and serve

recipes.title: Holiday Season Sweet Potato Casserole Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy holiday season sweet potato casserole recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 3 lbs sweet potato, peeled and cut
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Place sweet potatoes in a sauce pan, cover with water and boil until fork tender
Drain potatoes and return to pot
Add Greek yogurt and seasonings to potatoes, mix with a hand mixer
Add in melted butter and egg whites, beat well
Transfer potatoes to a lightly greased 9x13 casserole dish
Bake for 30 minutes
Remove from oven and top with pecans and marshmallows
Return to oven and bake additional 10 minutes until marshmallows are lightly browned

recipes.title: Home Made Protein and Carbohydrate Bar Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy home made protein and carbohydrate bar recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 tsp cake flavoring matching protein powder flavor
0.5 lb (227g) raisins or chopped apple and chopped nuts
instructions: Mix all ingredients together as you add them
Spread the mixture in an oven tray lined with greaseproof paper
Before baking, cut them into 10 squares with a knife
Put in a preheated oven at 325 degrees until lightly browned (about 15 minutes)
Store in an airtight container

recipes.title: Honey BBQ Slow Cooker Chicken Wings Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy honey bbq slow cooker chicken wings recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, place chicken wings on sheet and cook 10 minutes
While baking, spray slow cooker with nonstick spray, add half the BBQ sauce to the bottom
When wings are done, add to slow cooker, top with remaining BBQ sauce
Cook on high heat 2-3 hours or low heat 4-5 hours
Mix together cornstarch and water, 15 minutes before wings are done add cornstarch mixture and toss to coat
Allow the wings to finish cooking and the sauce to thicken
Serve piping hot

recipes.title: Jen Jewell's Bikini Booty Protein Smoothie Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy jen jewell's bikini booty protein smoothie recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 serving greens supplement or 2 cups spinach
instructions: Add protein powder to blender
Add greens supplement or spinach
Add chia seeds
Add frozen raspberries
Add almond milk
Blend for 5-10 seconds and enjoy!

recipes.title: Kurt Weidner's Saturday Blueberry Muffins Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy kurt weidner's saturday blueberry muffins recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Combine the oats, egg whites and blueberries. Mix evenly. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. After muffins cool, top with peanut butter.

recipes.title: Lemon-Thyme Roast Chicken Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy lemon-thyme roast chicken recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Six 4-inch fresh thyme sprigs or 2 tsp dried thyme leaves
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Sprinkle chicken cavities with pepper and salt
Roll lemons pressing lightly until softened, pierce each lemon 15 times about 1 inch deep
Place pierced lemons, 5 garlic cloves and thyme into large cavity of chicken, place remaining garlic into small cavity
Truss chicken. Sprinkle evenly with remaining pepper and salt
Place chicken breast-side up onto rack in large roasting pan
Roast 2 to 2.25 hours until chicken is cooked through and juices run clear
Remove from oven, let stand 10 minutes
Remove and discard skin, carve chicken and serve garnished with additional thyme sprigs

recipes.title: Lime BBQ Chicken With Salsa Cream Dipping Sauce Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy lime bbq chicken with salsa cream dipping sauce recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Cube chicken
Place cilantro, minced garlic, lime zest, lime juice, olive oil, salt and pepper into a bowl and stir
Place cubed chicken into marinade, cover and refrigerate 30-60 minutes maximum (citrus starts breaking down protein after 60 minutes)
Combine 1 cup sour cream with 1 cup salsa for dipping sauce
Place chicken on 8 skewers and cook on grill
Serve with salsa cream dipping sauce

recipes.title: Low Calorie Banana Bread Protein Muffins Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low calorie banana bread protein muffins recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Line 12 muffin cups with paper liners
Sift together dry ingredients
In a second bowl, mix together wet ingredients
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Evenly divide batter between 12 muffin cups
Bake for approximately 12 minutes
Allow to cool before eating

recipes.title: Low Calorie Chocolate Protein Cupcakes Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low calorie chocolate protein cupcakes recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
Mix protein powder and baking powder.
Add in egg whites, coconut oil, milk, applesauce.
Divide batter between 12 cupcake liners.
Bake for ~7 minutes.

recipes.title: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
recipes.description: A healthy low carb bacon cheddar ranch potato salad from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

recipes.title: Low Carb Chicken Carbonara Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low carb chicken carbonara recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Sea salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Preheat oven to 300F
Add oil to saute pan and set on medium-high heat
Season chicken with salt, pepper and Italian seasoning
Sear chicken until golden brown on each side, then move to baking sheet in oven
Deglaze pan with tomatoes, add garlic, mushrooms, and snow peas, saute until fragrant
Deglaze with white wine and cook until evaporated
Add milk and reduce by half, then add arrowroot slurry and thicken
Remove chicken from oven when internal temp reaches 160F, rest until 165F
Toss spaghetti squash into sauce
Serve baked chicken on top of sauced spaghetti squash

recipes.title: Low Carb, High Protein Pizza Crust Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low carb, high protein pizza crust recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Bring cream cheese to room temperature. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Combine cream cheese, eggs and seasoning in a mixing bowl
Spray a 9x13 baking pan with nonstick spray
Place parmesan cheese evenly on the bottom of the pan
Pour egg and cream cheese mixture over parmesan
Bake for 15-25 minutes until top starts to brown
Pull crust out of oven, add your favorite pizza toppings
Place back in oven and bake for 12-15 more minutes

recipes.title: Low-Carb Grilled Greek Turkey Cutlets & Fresh Green Beans Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy low-carb grilled greek turkey cutlets & fresh green beans recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Saute green beans in olive oil over medium heat until tender
Toss with salt and pepper to taste
Grill turkey cutlets until cooked through
Divide cutlets among plates
Sprinkle cutlets with olives, feta, tomato and fresh mint if desired
Serve with green beans

recipes.title: Mexican Style Stuffed Peppers Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy mexican style stuffed peppers recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 4 medium bell peppers, sliced in half and seeded
0.5 cup black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Bring a pot of water to a boil, add peppers and cook 4-5 minutes until tender
Drain and lay cut side up in baking pan
Heat large nonstick skillet over medium heat, add chicken and cook 2-3 minutes
Add remaining ingredients except cheese to chicken, stir and simmer 5 minutes
Evenly divide filling between pepper halves and top with shredded cheese
Cover baking dish with foil and cook for 30-35 minutes until cheese is melted
Serve hot

recipes.title: Mini Turkey Cheddar & Peppers Quiche Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy mini turkey cheddar & peppers quiche recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 12 oz Italian seasoned lean ground turkey
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Cook turkey as directed on package
Beat eggs, milk and black pepper in large bowl with whisk
Stir in turkey, cheese and veggies
Line muffin tin with parchment paper
Evenly distribute 0.25 cup of mixture in 16 tins
Bake for 26-30 minutes or until set
Allow quiche to cool for five minutes before serving

recipes.title: No Powder, No Problem - Tuna Protein Shake Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy no powder, no problem - tuna protein shake recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 can of Tuna, packed in water, drained
instructions: Don't fear the tuna shake! Combine all ingredients in a blender, and blend until extremely smooth.

recipes.title: No-Bake Gluten-Free High Protein Energy Bites Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy no-bake gluten-free high protein energy bites recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2 Tbsp Maple Syrup or Raw Honey
instructions: In large bowl, combine oats, ground chia, hemp seeds, cacao powder, protein powder, cinnamon and sea salt
Add in almond butter, maple syrup, vanilla and optional mix-ins, mix until just combined
Scoop 1 tbsp of mixture and roll between hands into ball
Place on cookie sheet and repeat until all mixture is used (makes about 20-28)
Place cookie sheet in refrigerator for about 30 minutes to set
Store in airtight container in refrigerator for up to 1 week

recipes.title: Nutritious Hot Body Turkey Chili Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy nutritious hot body turkey chili recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Himalayan salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Lightly spray frying pan with cooking spray
Add turkey and onions, crumble turkey and cook fully
Stir in remaining ingredients
Cover pot with lid
Continue to cook on low heat for 30 minutes

recipes.title: Peach Mango Protein Soft Serve Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy peach mango protein soft serve recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Add protein powder and greek yogurt to food processor.
Blend until combined.
Add in frozen fruit.
Pulse until combined.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Protein Gingerbread Men Cookie Recipe
recipes.description: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian
instructions: Combine dry ingredients in a mixing bowl.
Whisk together molasses, coconut oil and egg.
Combine wet and dry ingredients.
Chill dough 30 minutes.
Roll, cut, and bake at 375F for 8-10 minutes.

recipes.title: Protein Packed Chili Dog Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy protein packed chili dog recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 8 oz no salt added tomato sauce
instructions: Combine ground turkey, tomato sauce and all seasonings in a pan over medium heat
Cook 3-4 minutes then reduce to medium-low and simmer
While chili simmers, place hot dogs on heated grill and cook until desired temperature
Grill rolls if desired
Place hot dogs into buns
Evenly divide chili among 6 hot dogs
Top with optional toppings such as mustard, cheese, or slaw

recipes.title: Protein Packed Chocolate Ice Cream Sandwiches Recipe
recipes.description: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian
ingredients: 2 scoops Quest Nutrition Chocolate Protein Powder
instructions: Mix together greek yogurt and protein powder.
Break graham crackers in half.
Spread greek yogurt mixture evenly between 6 half sheets.
Top with other half of graham cracker.
Place in freezer for a minimum of 2 hours.

recipes.title: Pulled BBQ Chicken Potato Skins Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy pulled bbq chicken potato skins recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 1 cup reduced fat shredded cheddar cheese
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Rinse potatoes and pierce with a fork
Place potatoes on a baking sheet and bake for about 1 hour or until tender
While potatoes are cooking, boil chicken for about 8-10 minutes or until cooked through
When chicken is done, shred it by using 2 forks
Toss the chicken with the BBQ sauce and set aside
When potatoes are done, cut in half and scoop out the middle
Evenly divide the pulled BBQ chicken among the potatoes
Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese
Return to the oven and bake an additional 20 minutes until cheese is melted

recipes.title: Pumpkin Spice Protein Donuts With Cream Cheese Frosting Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy pumpkin spice protein donuts with cream cheese frosting recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: FROSTING (optional): 1/2 cup whipped cream cheese, 1/2 tsp liquid stevia
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Combine first 7 dry ingredients in a bowl
Combine wet ingredients in a separate bowl and whisk well
Add wet into dry ingredients and mix
Spray 8-10 donut molds with nonstick spray
Evenly divide batter between each donut mold
Bake for approximately 10 minutes or until toothpick comes out clean
While cooling, mix together cream cheese and stevia for frosting
Frost donuts and sprinkle with additional cinnamon

recipes.title: Quick & Easy Protein Brown Rice Pudding Recipe
recipes.description: Recipes Snacks High Protein Vegetarian
instructions: Combine brown rice, almond milk, butter, cinnamon and vanilla in a medium pot.
Bring to a slow simmer.
Add protein powder and remaining milk.
Mix over low heat until thick and creamy.
Serve warm or refrigerate.

recipes.title: Rich Knapp's Peanut Butter Cookies Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy rich knapp's peanut butter cookies recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Mix flour, protein powder, salt and baking soda and set aside
Mix applesauce and peanut butter
Add honey and mix well
Add egg whites and beat well
Stir flour mixture into peanut butter mixture
Drop dough from teaspoon onto greased baking sheet and flatten
Bake at 375 degrees for 10 to 15 minutes until lightly browned

recipes.title: Salsa And Chicken Whole Wheat Pizza Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy salsa and chicken whole wheat pizza recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 12 inch whole wheat pizza crust, store bought
8 ounces Mexican four cheese blend, shredded
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Spread salsa evenly over pizza crust
Add diced onions, chopped black olives and finely chopped fresh spinach
Top with cheese and cubed chicken
Bake for 12-15 minutes until cheese is melted
Let the pizza rest for several minutes
Cut into 4 slices and serve

recipes.title: Scallop Cerviche Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy scallop cerviche recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Juice of 6 limes, enough to cover scallops
instructions: Put the scallops into a shallow bowl and squeeze lime juice over them
Cover and refrigerate for 4-8 hours (overnight is fine)
The acid from the limes cooks the scallops in a process called ceviche
After soaking, remove scallops and drain off most of the remaining lime juice
Dice the onion, tomato, and celery, and add to the scallops
Add capers, salt, olive oil and pepper
Refrigerate for another hour and serve cold

recipes.title: Sesame CranButter Sirloin Steak Tip Skewers Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy sesame cranbutter sirloin steak tip skewers recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 3/4 cup Nuts N More High Protein Sesame Cranbutter
instructions: Mix together sesame cranbutter, liquid aminos, garlic and hot water.
Cut sirloin steak into strips.
Marinate in refrigerator for 3-4 hours.
Thread onto skewers and grill to desired doneness.
Serve with remaining marinade as dipping sauce.

recipes.title: Simple & Creamy Protein Tiramisu Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy simple & creamy protein tiramisu recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: In a large bowl combine Greek yogurt, protein powder, vanilla and stevia
Mix using an electric hand mixer for 45-60 seconds until protein is fully combined
Soak lady fingers one at a time in coffee and place on bottom of 8x8 baking dish. Repeat using 1/3 of the cookies
Top cookies with 1/3 of Greek yogurt mixture, 1 tsp ground cinnamon and 1 tsp cocoa powder
Repeat for 2 additional layers
Top the final layer of Greek yogurt with shaved dark chocolate
Place in refrigerator overnight to fully set

recipes.title: Simple Low Carb Orange Chicken Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy simple low carb orange chicken recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 6 tbsp sugar free orange marmalade or jelly
1 tbsp soy sauce or coconut aminos for gluten free
instructions: Cut chicken breast into bite size pieces
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Add in chicken breast and cook 1-2 minutes
Sprinkle in onion powder and garlic powder and continue to cook
While chicken is cooking, mix together orange marmalade, soy sauce and apple cider vinegar
Once chicken is cooked, turn down heat and add in sauce
Toss chicken in sauce to coat
Cover and allow sauce to thicken
Serve in lettuce cups, over brown rice or cauliflower rice
Sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired

recipes.title: Strawberry Protein Bars With Raisins Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy strawberry protein bars with raisins recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 4 scoops strawberry flavored whey protein powder
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well
Spread in a 9x9 baking pan lined with parchment paper
Place in refrigerator and allow to set overnight
Cut into 6 equal squares

recipes.title: Swedish Beef Patties With Onions Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy swedish beef patties with onions recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Mash the potatoes and mix with the ground beef
Add salt, pepper and water, work the meat mixture until smooth and shape into patties
Heat a skillet with 1 tbsp butter, add the onions and cook over moderate heat until golden brown
Transfer onions to a platter and keep hot
Melt remaining butter in skillet and cook the patties over moderate heat until brown on both sides and cooked throughout
Serve patties with sauteed onions and vegetables of your choice

recipes.title: Thai Spiced Chicken Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy thai spiced chicken recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Lime wedges and salad greens to serve
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F
Put chicken in a shallow dish in one layer
Blend a third of the yogurt, the curry paste and 3 tbsp of cilantro, season well with salt and pour over chicken, turning pieces until evenly coated
Leave for at least 10 minutes or in fridge overnight
Lift chicken onto a rack in a roasting tin and roast for 35-40 minutes until golden
Blend together remaining yogurt and cilantro, finely chop cucumber and stir into yogurt mixture, season
Serve with the chicken and garnish with lime wedges and salad greens

recipes.title: Triple Chocolate Chip Deep Dish Protein Cookie Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy triple chocolate chip deep dish protein cookie recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: Optional toppings: ice cream, additional chocolate peanut butter for drizzling
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Combine all ingredients except chocolate chips in a bowl
Using an electric mixer, mix well
Gently fold in chocolate chips
Pour batter into an 8 inch oven safe skillet (cast iron skillet works best)
Bake for approximately 20 minutes or until top is golden
Allow to sit 5-10 minutes to finish cooking
Top with ice cream and additional chocolate peanut butter if desired

recipes.title: Turkey Sausage Frittata With Egg Whites Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy turkey sausage frittata with egg whites recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Brown sausage in pan while thawing broccoli in the microwave
Mix together and season to taste
Place in 9x11 baking dish
Pour egg whites over almost to cover
Bake at 350-375 for approximately 40 minutes

recipes.title: Whey, Honey And Peanut Butter Protein Bar Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy whey, honey and peanut butter protein bar recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Combine honey and peanut butter in a microwave safe bowl
Microwave in 20-second intervals, stirring each time, until soft enough to mix
Mix in whey protein powder and oats
Spread mixture into a greased 9x9 or 9x13 pan lined with parchment paper
Place pan in fridge for one hour
Remove, cut into 8 squares, and enjoy

recipes.title: White Chocolate Peppermint Protein Bars Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy white chocolate peppermint protein bars recipe from Muscle & Strength.
instructions: Sift together coconut flour and protein powder
In a separate bowl, melt coconut oil
Add peanut butter and honey to melted coconut oil and mix until combined
Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix well
Line a dish with parchment paper
Evenly spread mixture into pan
Sprinkle with crushed peppermint and lightly press into top of bars
Place in refrigerator to set
Remove and cut into desired size pieces
Store in refrigerator until ready to enjoy

recipes.title: White Chocolate Strawberry Coconut Protein Truffles Recipe
recipes.description: A healthy white chocolate strawberry coconut protein truffles recipe from Muscle & Strength.
ingredients: 2.5 scoops Nutriforce Sports Strawberry Protein Powder
instructions: Mix dry ingredients together.
Combine honey and coconut oil and heat until melted.
Combine wet and dry ingredients.
Chill for 30 minutes.
Roll into truffles and coat with melted white chocolate.
Refrigerate until set.

recipes.title: 30-Minute Vegan Thai Curry Recipe
recipes.description: In 30 minutes prepare this vegan Thai curry recipe overflowing with nutrient-dense vegetables coated in a savory red curry coconut broth.
ingredients: 1.5 cups bok choy, chopped into pieces
instructions: Mise en place your ingredients and mince or chop any vegetables. If you have purchased pre-baked or enjoy the raw firm tofu, cube it into 1-inch cubes and set aside with the rest of your ingredients or air-fry your tofu separately.

Heat a stockpot or cast-iron pot over medium heat for one minute and add coconut oil. Add in the onions and saute for 1 minute, then add the garlic and ginger along with any other aromatic ingredients. Cook the aromatics for 2 minutes until they are fragrant and translucent.
Add the mushrooms, red bell pepper, and bok choy to the pot and cook for 5 minutes until they are slightly tender.
Add in your coconut milk and broth, being sure to gently release any curry paste or spices stuck to the bottom or sides of the pan.
Bring to a boil then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes then finish by adding in the tofu or vegan protein of your choice.

recipes.title: Cheesy Vegan Tofu Scramble Recipe
recipes.description: Cooking high-protein vegan breakfasts can be difficult. Because of this, we wanted to create a delicious, savory, protein packed recipe that you can make at any time. Make this meal ahead of time, store in meal prep containers, and have a delicious vegan breakfast ready to go during the week!
ingredients: 14 ounces firm tofu, drained and pressed
½ cup Trifecta green bell pepper
½ cup Trifecta portobello mushrooms, diced
instructions: Crumble tofu into a large bowl.
Stir in spices and nutritional yeast, 1 to 2 Tbsp of olive oil, and let sit for five minutes.
Add crumbled tofu to the skillet and sauté for 5 minutes, until tofu is lightly golden and firm.
Add in veggies and stir for another 3 to 4 minutes, mixing flavors together until spinach is wilted.
Season with salt and pepper and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
recipes.description: Dig into this delicious gluten-free, coconut-cashew fried chicken perfect for anyone following a keto diet or wanting to try a new style of fried chicken!
instructions: Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.

Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.

Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

recipes.title: Fluffy High-Protein Vegan Pancake Recipe
recipes.description: This wholesome and healthy, high-protein almond butter vegan pancake recipe is gluten-free, oil-free, and trouble-free.
instructions: In a small bowl whisk together flours, baking powder, protein powder, and almond butter powder.
In a separate bowl whisk together vanilla, milk, maple syrup, and lemon juice. Then combine with dry ingredients to form a thick batter.

Heat a medium or large nonstick skillet over medium-low heat. Lightly spray the skillet with coconut oil or avocado oil and measure out ½ cup of batter per large pancake. Cook for 3-4 minutes per side, adjusting the heat as needed.

recipes.title: Garlic Shrimp Zucchini Noodle Recipe
recipes.description: Prepare this creamy garlic shrimp zucchini noodle recipe in less than 10 minutes for a quick low-carb noodle dish.
ingredients: 2 Medium zucchinis or 1 package spiralized zucchini
3 tablespoons goat cheese, crumbled or feta cheese
instructions: Spiralize your zucchini or set aside a package of store-bought spiral zucchini. Remove the Trifecta Shrimp from the container and rinse, set aside. For the garlic use a Microplane or grater instead of trying to cut it up with your knife. This is a great trick when a recipe calls for a lot of garlic! Measure out all of the additional ingredients, feel free to add additional vegetables or more garlic depending on what you like!

Heat a non-stick skillet or saute pan over medium heat and add 1 teaspoon avocado oil and garlic. Cook for 2 minutes or until aromatic, add in the Trifecta shrimp and cook for 2 more minutes. If you are using raw shrimp, cook for 6-8 minutes until opaque and cooked through.
Add Acids, Herbs, and Goat Cheese
Add in the tomatoes and zucchini noodles, cook for 1-2 minutes until noodles are coated with the sauce.

recipes.title: Hunan Chicken Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: Hunan's cuisine has flavors that are dry and spicy. Find a bright dish with a sauce recipe that coats your chicken beautifully and satiates any spice cravings!
ingredients: 2 cups Trifecta brown or white rice
6 dried chilis, halved lengthwise, seeded, Sichuan or Thai whole
2 teaspoon Sherry Vinegar or red wine vinegar
¼ cup Soy sauce, low sodium, or tamari for gluten-free
instructions: Dice chicken into even square size bites. Combine broccoli and bell peppers in a bowl and in another separate bowl, portion your choice of Trifecta rice. Lastly combine all sauce ingredients except for the ginger, in a fourth bowl and whisk. Set aside.

In a non-stick pan, heat up 1 teaspoon of avocado oil over medium-high heat until slightly smoking and oil is shimmering. Add ginger and cook for a few seconds until fragrant, mixing constantly. Add the chicken and vegetables. Sautee until heated through for about 2-3 minutes.

Add sauce to pan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon or spatula, and remove once the sauce has thickened. Taste for seasoning and adjust if needed. Feel free to add 1 teaspoon of honey if too savory.
Meanwhile, as the sauce thickens, reheat the rice in the microwave for 2 minutes.
Plate ½ cup of rice in a bowl, followed by around 5 ounces of the Hunan chicken. Garnish with fresh-picked cilantro and/or toasted sesame seeds. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Maple Cinnamon Sweet Potato Waffle Recipe
recipes.description: You'll never want a boring regular waffle again after making this protein-packed Maple Cinnamon Sweet Potato Waffle recipe.
ingredients: 1/2 cup greek yogurt or cottage cheese
1 cup all-purpose flour or rolled oats (gluten-free version)
instructions: Combine all of the ingredients together in a blender and blend until smooth. Set aside while the waffle maker preheats.
Generously spray the waffle maker with non-stick spray then measure 1/2 cup amount of batter into each space. Close Lid and cook for 4-5 minutes until done.

recipes.title: Protein Overnight Oats Recipe
recipes.description: Meal prep this protein overnight oats recipe in less than 10 minutes for a macro balanced, healthy breakfast all week long!
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix.
Transfer the ingredients to a jar, cover with lid or plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
In the morning, remove lid/plastic wrap and add toppings as desired. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Quinoa Breakfast Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: Loaded with healthy grains and topped with crunchy apples and cinnamon, you can't go wrong with this quinoa breakfast bowl recipe.
ingredients: 2/3 cup of milk or dairy alternative
instructions: Gather all of the ingredients you are using for your quinoa breakfast bowl recipe and slice any additional ingredients needed.
Heat a small sauce pot over medium heat and combine all of the ingredients besides the garnishes and heat for 3-4 minutes until warmed through.

Remove your quinoa breakfast porridge from the heat and portion into meal prep containers. If you're preparing this as a part of your weekly meal prep, be sure to allow the breakfast bowl to cool completely uncovered in your fridge before topping it with any garnishes.

recipes.title: Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise
recipes.description: A new twist on a breakfast staple, this Salmon Eggs Benedict with Avocado Hollandaise will transform your Sunday brunch. Enjoy on it's own or pair with roasted potatoes, fresh orange juice, or some warm coffee for a perfect start to your day!
instructions: For the Hollandaise: In a blender combine ½ a ripe avocado and 2 pinches of salt and pepper with 2 tsps of lemon juice and 1/3 cup of water. Blend until smooth (approximately a minute and a half). While still blending, add 1 tablespoons of olive oil and continue to blend until combined. Set aside.

Then, In the small saucepan add a ½ tbsp of olive oil and a handful of spinach, salt, and pepper. Flip the spinach a couple of times so that is coated in the olive oil and cook down until the spinach is wilted. Remove from heat for later use.
In a small non-stick pan heat Trifecta salmon over low heat. When salmon is warm to the touch turn up heat to medium to lightly brown and crisp up the salmon filet.
While heating the salmon, toast the English muffin and eggs.
To plate, place a portion of the wilted spinach on the English muffin and layer the browned salmon and poached egg. Top with the avocado hollandaise and some red pepper flakes.

recipes.title: The Best High-Protein French Toast Recipe
recipes.description: This high-protein easy french toast recipe with 32 grams of protein per serving is sure to start your day off right.
ingredients: 3 tablespoons almond butter powder or peanut butter powder
instructions: In a shallow dish combine the egg whites, whole egg, dairy-free milk, cinnamon, ginger, almond powder, maple syrup, and vanilla extract to the dish. Mix together ingredients until even.
To make this recipe quick and easy, set yourself up with a baking sheet, the shallow dish of batter, and a non-stick skillet. Additionally, you will need a spatula and some non-stick spray.
Heat the skillet over medium heat, while it is heating, dip the bread into the batter on both sides and soak for at least 1 minute, ensuring it is heavily saturated with the batter.

Spray the pan with nonstick cooking spray and place in the toast, you should hear a gentle sizzle sound; maintain a medium heat throughout the cooking time to ensure your french toast doesn’t burn. Flip the toast when one side is lightly browned and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side. Then remove from the skillet once each side is golden brown.

recipes.title: Turkey Sausage & Sweet Potato Breakfast Casserole Recipe
recipes.description: Meal prep a complete breakfast in one dish with our hearty turkey sausage and sweet potato breakfast casserole recipe. One slice eats like a full meal.
ingredients: 3 cups (600 g) sweet potatoes & cut into ½ inch cubes
1 lb. lean turkey sausage, sliced or crumbled
⅓ cup milk ( if plant-based, use unsweetened plain)
1 teaspoon chipotle powder and 1 teaspoon chili flakes (if you like spice)
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees F. In a sheet pan lined with foil, season the potato dices with salt, pepper, and olive oil. Cook the potato dices for 15 minutes undisturbed. Use a fork or cake tester to test their doneness. If the fork goes in without any resistance, pull the potatoes and keep them aside. Be careful not to burn yourself or the surface where you hold them (use hot pads if leaving on the counter).
Heat a skillet to medium-high and cook the turkey sausage until browned. Remove from skillet with a slotted spoon. Leave 1 tablespoon of rendered fat. Cool and discard the rest.

Cook the onion and red pepper in the sausage fat until translucent. Add the garlic and cook a few more minutes. Prepare a large baking dish (9x13 inches), by spraying liberally with spray oil. Otherwise, use a cast-iron skillet, together with sausage and potato dices. Spread evenly.
Reduce oven heat to 375F. In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, black pepper, and chipotle if desired, and pour the mix into the baking dish. Stir to combine everything.
Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes. Uncover and continue baking for 10-15 more minutes. Set a timer.
Let the breakfast casserole rest for a few minutes. Top with sliced green onion and serve hot.

recipes.title: Vegan Balsamic Mushroom Avocado Toast Recipe
recipes.description: This simple vegan and gluten-free high-protein, mouth-watering vegan balsamic mushroom avocado toast recipe is the perfect quick breakfast or lunch.
ingredients: 2 slices millet-chia GF bread (or 1 slice sprouted wheat bread)
½ cup sliced shiitake mushrooms or 1/2 cup
instructions: Preheat an oven to 400 degrees and toast bread for 3-5 minutes depending on personal preference. Or toast in a toaster oven.
In a small bowl, mash the avocado and combine with the lime juice and sea salt, then set aside.

Preheat a saute pan over medium-high heat for 1 minute. Add chopped mushrooms and tempeh, saute for 3 minutes stirring frequently. After 3 minutes add half of the water to "steam" and continue to saute.
Saute for 3 more minutes, then add the balsamic, coconut aminos, and lemon juice. Cook for 2 more minutes or until the liquids have formed a glaze over the mushrooms and tempeh. Remove from heat.
To build your Toast: spread the mashed avocado onto the toasted bread and top with balsamic glazed mushroom and tempeh. Add arugula dressed lightly in lemon juice or kale for extra crunch and flavor.

recipes.title: Vegan Breakfast Muesli Recipe
recipes.description: This delicious and creamy instant or overnight dish is perfect to stay ahead of your meal prep and still meet your macronutrient needs!
ingredients: ½ cup coconut yogurt (we used Laava)
1 scoop plant-based protein powder (We used Absolute Zero Essential)
instructions: Mix rolled oats, almonds, seeds, dried cranberries in a bowl. Add soy milk, coconut yogurt, and one scoop of protein powder. Mix to incorporate. Top with fresh berries, cacao nibs, and flakes if eating immediately.

If making an overnight oats-style Muesli, combine all ingredients with the exception of fresh fruit and garnishes in a bowl large enough to mix all ingredients evenly. Transfer to a serving bowl or a mason jar. Cover with either lid or plastic wrap and leave overnight in the refrigerator. Feel free to prep garnishes ahead of time so you can simply drop them on top of Muesli in the AM and have a quick to-go breakfast.

recipes.title: Vegan High-Protein French Toast Recipe
recipes.description: This vegan high-protein vegan toast recipe packs 20 grams of protein per serving and is sure to start your day off right.
ingredients: 6 Slices high protein bread like P28 protein bread
1 Cup aquafaba, drained from 1 can of chickpeas
½ Cup dairy-free milk (coconut milk, soy milk, or almond milk)
4 Tablespoons almond butter powder or peanut butter powder
instructions: In a medium sized bowl, whip your aquafaba and maple syrup into a medium-stiff foam; this may take 4-5 minutes or longer if you are whipping by hand. We recommend using an electric mixer to speed things up, we used our Breville all-in-one handheld mixer.
Gently fold in the spices, almond butter powder, vanilla extract, and dairy-free milk to make the batter.
To make this recipe quick and easy, set yourself up with a baking sheet, the shallow dish of batter, and a non-stick skillet. Additionally, you will need a spatula and some non-stick spray.
Heat the skillet over medium heat, while it is heating, dip the bread into the batter on both sides and soak for at least 1 minute, ensuring it is heavily saturated with the batter.

Spray the pan with nonstick cooking spray and place in the toast, you should hear a gentle sizzle sound; Flip the toast when one side is lightly browned and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side. Then remove from the skillet once each side is golden brown.

recipes.title: Vegan Low-Carb Breakfast Taco Recipe
recipes.description: Love Tex-Mex food and tacos for breakfast but need to watch your carb intake? In 20 minutes or less enjoy this easy vegan low-carb breakfast taco recipe.
ingredients: pinch black pepper and sea salt
instructions: Crumble tofu into a large bowl and add spices.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat for 1 minute then add oil.
Add tofu to the hot skillet and cook for 5-8 minutes until golden and firm. Finish with Lime juice.
To Build Taco: Gently place the tofu filling into your jicama tortilla and top with 1-2 Tablespoons of pico or salsa along with fresh cilantro.

recipes.title: Vegan Mediterranean Beyond Breakfast Skillet Recipe
recipes.description: This hearty Vegan Meditteranean breakfast recipe skillet packs in the protein and flavor, making it the perfect skillet to start your day.
ingredients: 4 Trifecta A La Carte Beyond Beef® patties or 1 (16 oz) package Beyond Beef®
1 can artichoke hearts, drained and sliced
½ cup sweet potato, small diced
instructions: Heat a medium cast-iron pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add chickpeas, sweet potato, garlic, and onion; sauté for 5 minutes, stirring often.
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice then crumble in the Beyond Meat®.
Cook for 5 minutes until lightly browned then mix in the coriander, nutritional yeast, artichoke hearts, and tomatoes. Sauté on medium-high heat for 5 more minutes. Then turn off the heat.
Mix in the olives and fresh herbs then dig in!

recipes.title: Vegetarian Sweet Potato and Greens Breakfast Hash Recipe
recipes.description: This one-pan vegetarian sweet potato and greens breakfast hash recipe will provide 4 days of breakfast in less than 30 minutes.
ingredients: 1.5 cups thinly chopped collard greens, dandelion greens, spinach, or kale
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add two tablespoons of coconut oil. Add in the small diced sweet potato and cook for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally. The potatoes will start to brown and crisp up. While the potatoes are cooking, move on to step 2.
Remove the tofu from its packaging and crumbIe it into a small bowl. Add the nutritional yeast, onion powder, garlic powder, black pepper, paprika, and pinch of salt. Mix to combine then set aside.

Once the potatoes start to get tender and browned, add in the diced bell pepper and greens if you are using a hearty green like collard greens or kale. Saute the potatoes and peppers for 3 minutes. If you are using any other roasted vegetables, add them right now as well. If you are using leafy greens such spinach, dandelion greens, or arugula wait to add those at the very end, after the tofu, as they will cook extremely fast. If the potatoes and peppers start to stick to the bottom of the sk...
Add the tofu and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until the tofu is firm and cooked through. Season with salt and pepper, and a squeeze of lemon. Then, dig in!

recipes.title: Air Fried Vegan Tofu Recipe
recipes.description: A combination of dry rub spices adds a deep flavor to the tofu itself before cooking it. Use this simple recipe as your go-to meal prep recipe for tofu!
ingredients: 1 block extra-firm tofu, drained and pressed
instructions: Remove tofu from container and drain of all water. Place tofu in between two paper towels and press down with a heavy block or book for 5-10 minutes. This will help the tofu drain off excess water and it will help it sear much faster.
As the tofu drains, combine all dry spices in a bowl and mix.
Once tofu has been drained, pat dry, cut into slices, dice, or whichever preferred cut. Toss dry ingredients into a bowl with the tofu and mix to incorporate.
Cook according to air-fryer suggested instructions (potentially on average anywhere between 5-8 minutes) or by searing/sauteing in a pan. Serve with desired sides or dish.

recipes.title: Balsamic Glazed Steak Rolls Recipe
recipes.description: Balsamic Glazed Steak Rolls is from our collection of clean recipes for you to play with here. You can also use our Trifecta A La Carte items to up your meal prep, or you can also make this recipe from scratch by cooking your own proteins.
ingredients: 8-2oz thin slices sirloin or flank steak (length and width according to personal preference). You can also use our Trifecta Steaks, sliced lengthwise thinly.
Salt and Freshly Ground Black Pepper, TT
1 Red Bell Pepper, Sliced into Thin Strips
1 Green Bell Pepper, Sliced into Thin Strips
1 Medium Yellow Onion, Halved and then Thinly Sliced
instructions: Rub each side of the steak slices with a little grapeseed oil. Sprinkle with salt, freshly ground black pepper, and some of the chopped fresh rosemary.

On a sauté pan, heat one tablespoon of grape seed oil in a skillet over medium-high heat, and cook the onions and peppers until translucent and tender, seasoning with salt and pepper. Keep in a plate lined with paper towels until needed.

Place a few of the vegetable strips vertically on one end of each steak cutlet so that once rolled up the end of the vegetables are sticking out of each end of the steak roll. Roll it up, and secure it with a toothpick. Repeat for each steak roll.

For the rosemary balsamic glaze: Heat the olive oil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and cook for one minute, until fragrant. Add the balsamic vinegar, red wine, brown sugar, and rosemary sprigs and bring to a rapid boil. Reduce the heat and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes. Add the broth, return to a boil, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for another 15 minutes. Discard the rosemary springs.

Prepare the grill and grill each steak roll on each side for about 2 minutes or according to the desired doneness. Do the same if cooking them in a skillet, sauté over medium-high heat until done. Serve immediately drizzled with warm rosemary balsamic glaze.

recipes.title: Curried Cauliflower Quinoa Recipe
recipes.description: Deep, rich and flavorful, this easy quinoa side dish is ready in less than 5 minutes. Pair with chicken or fish for macro balanced meal prep.
instructions: Dice the scallion and bell pepper into small bite sized pieces. Then wash, de-stem and mince the parsley.
In a large mixing bowl, combine quinoa, cauliflower and chopped veggies. Add in raisins and parsley.
Stir in curry powder to evenly coat everything. Add some chili flakes to increase spiciness.
Add olive oil and lemon juice, and season with salt to taste.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe
recipes.description: Flatbreads are versatile options when you are feeling like eating something starchy yet still healthy. The beef, cheese, and pesto make a delicious dinner.
ingredients: ½ cup store-bought slaw mix or thinly sliced cabbage (use a mandolin)
instructions: Preheat toaster oven or larger oven to 350F. Slightly toast the flatbreads to help them keep their bodies and avoid becoming soggy while constructing them. Spray a sheet tray with oil and spread all four flatbreads on the tray, making sure they are not overlapping each other. Toast for 3 minutes, keeping an eye on the flatbreads. Remove from the oven carefully. Keep oven on.

Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Spread 1 tablespoon of pesto on top of each flatbread.
Divide ¼ cup of arugula and ¼ cup of Trifecta mushrooms on top of each flatbread, sprinkling around.
Similarly, sprinkle 4 ounces of the crumbled beef on each flatbread. Finish by dividing the 1 ounce of crumbled gorgonzola cheese evenly into all 4 flatbreads (¼ ounce on each).
Return built flatbreads to the sheet tray used to toast the flatbreads, and bake in the oven for 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Cut into quarters and enjoy!

recipes.title: Easy Creamy Ahi Tuna Pasta
recipes.description: Creamy and savory, this dairy-free creamy ahi tuna pasta is perfect for a family dinner or weekly meal prep. Packed with protein and easy to make, this may just be a new favorite! Enjoy on its own or with some of our favorite sides.
ingredients: 1 Tbsp of Extra Virgin Olive Oil
1 Cup of Cashew or Almond Milk
instructions: In a pan, saute the garlic for 2-3 minutes. Then add the milk, water, broth, pasta, and salt and pepper.
Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally.
Add additional milk if needed. Then add the tuna (cut up or shredded), mustard, and lemon juice.
Let the pasta cook on low for 5-10 minutes or until it thickens.

recipes.title: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
recipes.description: The rich combination of spices makes this paleo chili recipe deeply rich in flavor and a quick solution for your meal prep or a quick meal!
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
instructions: Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.

Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...

Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...

Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

recipes.title: Fall Chicken and Rice Soup Recipe
recipes.description: This home-cooked, hearty chicken soup is ideal for the fall and winter months of the year. Enjoy this mom-like, flavor-rich soup recipe, using Trifecta's A La Carte items.
ingredients: 8 cups water or stock, chicken and vegetable/mushroom base, split
To taste, Salt and Black Pepper
instructions: Prepare the chicken by dicing the chicken, or using the Trifecta pulled chicken, if preferred. Keep in a bowl until needed. Separately, prepare all vegetables as indicated. For the carrots, peel 2-3 depending on the size, cut the ends and discard, slice in half, and cut across evenly about 1” size half-moons. After washing, cut the celery across in an equivalent size to the carrots, discarding the tops and bottoms. Dice the onions on a medium size and mix with celery and carrots. This is call...

In a pan deep enough to hold all ingredients plus stock, heat up the grapeseed oil over medium-high heat, until the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking. Immediately add the mirepoix (onion, celery, carrot mix) and increase heat to high. Stir often avoiding the onions from burning, and adjust heat as needed, reducing if the vegetables begin to charr too much.

Cook mirepoix for 3-5 minutes, again - adjusting the heat as needed - or until the vegetables begin to become translucent. Add the diced chicken, along with the tomato paste. Mix to coat all ingredients in the pot with it. The tomato paste should cook and become fragrant for a few minutes. Before the paste begins to burn, add the stocks to the pan to deglaze and mix scraping any brown bits (this is flavor so make sure you do this with a wooden spoon ideally).

Bring the mix to a boil. Once boiling, add broccoli and rice. Simmer for another 3 minutes or until all vegetables are heated through. Serve immediately dividing all soup guts amongst 4 bowls, and then topping off with any extra stock.

If not eating immediately, cool the soup immediately by placing a large Ziploc bag filled with ice inside the pot, stirring occasionally. Once cooled down to 40F or below, store in an air-tight container.

recipes.title: Fast Chicken Shawarma with Sweet Potato Recipe
recipes.description: The beauty behind chicken Shawarma is in the mix of spices. Follow the quick Shawarma wet rub recipe that will pack a punch of flavor and create an almost-authentic dish!
ingredients: Garnish, optional: Greek-lemon yogurt and chopped fresh parsley
½ teaspoon of the following: ground garlic, ground cumin, ground caraway, ground cardamom, ground ginger, paprika, ground cinnamon, and black pepper
instructions: Mix the Shawarma wet rub ingredients in a bowl. The consistency should be a paste
Dice the chicken into bite-size squares, as even as possible. Add diced chicken into the bowl with the spice paste. Mix to coat evenly.

Heat up a non-stick pan over medium heat, and spray to coat with spray oil. Add the chicken and heat for 2-3 minutes. Taste to make sure chicken is heated through. Turn off heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm-up both sweet potato mash and broccoli in separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave. Add 30 seconds if broccoli and sweet potato are not heated through. Keep warm until needed.
Plate ½ cup of sweet potato, along with ½ cup of broccoli and 4 ounces of the chicken Shawarma. Garnish with greek-lemon yogurt and parsley if desired.

recipes.title: Grilled Cheese Recipe High-Protein with Pulled Pork
recipes.description: Healthy grilled cheese is easier than ever with Trifecta pulled pork! Try this high protein grilled cheese recipe tonight and enjoy the flavor bomb.
ingredients: ½ cup low fat cheddar cheese, shredded
40g Brie cheese, divided into 10g per serving
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat and spray with spray oil.

Reheat the Trifecta pulled pork in either a non-stick pan or in a microwave for about 1.5 minutes. If meal prepping, skip this step and simply separate the pulled pork with your hands. Add a pinch of salt to season the pork if desired.

One slice of bread, spread 10g of the brie cheese. Then, in the same pan, place both slices of bread and begin to toast over medium-low heat. Add ⅛ cup of the low fat cheddar cheese, along with ⅛ cup of the fontina cheese, and let melt for 1-2 minutes as the bread toasts. Top with the pulled pork, and top with cilantro before placing the other bread on top.
Place the other slice of bread on top.
Continue to toast the sandwich for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the bread is toasted and the cheese is melted.
If meal prepping, cool down completely before you wrap or store the sandwiches in meal prep containers. Otherwise, serve immediately and enjoy!
Want to get more out of your weekly meal prep efforts? Stick to your
Grilled Cheese Recipe High-Protein with Pulled Pork
COOK TIME:
10 min
PREP TIME:
5 min

recipes.title: High Protein Greek Yogurt Parfait Recipe
recipes.description: Packed with protein this sweet parfait is the perfect way to start or finish your day! Meal prep in advance for a grab and go option.
ingredients: To meal prep a single serving of this recipe, you'll need the following ingredients:
1 cup non-fat Greek yogurt (I used Fage)
1 tbsp blueberry fruit preserves (no sugar added)
Optional: add a 1/2 scoop of protein powder for even more sweetness and protein.
instructions: Start by creating your blueberry compote.
Warm frozen blueberries in the microwave or set on a countertop at room temperature until they produce a small amount of juice. Then combine with preserves, setting aside a few berries for topping.
Then mix your high protein granola by combining hemp hearts and granola cereal.
Then build your parfait! Layer berry mixture on the bottom of the serving jar, followed by alternating layers of the granola mixture and yogurt.
Top with blueberries and granola mixture to garnish.
Store in the fridge until ready to enjoy!
Want to get more out of your meal prep? Get shredded and dial in your nutrition with this
. An RD-written guide complete with macro meal planner, food lists, and expert advice to help you lose weight quickly.
High Protein Greek Yogurt Parfait Recipe
