recipes.title: Pumpkin Spice Chia Seed Pudding Recipe
recipes.description: Enjoy this delicious vegan, pumpkin pie chia pudding recipe year-round as a delicious breakfast or dessert!
instructions: Gather and measure all ingredients and set aside meal prep containers or mason jars for storage.
Mix together 3/4 cup milk, 1/2 of the pumpkin spice, chia seeds, vanilla, and honey for 1 portion of pudding. Refrigerate the puddings overnight then enjoy!

recipes.title: Red, White, & Blue Deviled Eggs
recipes.description: For a fun and extremely festive way to celebrate Independence day, these Red, White, & Blue deviled eggs will be a huge hit with all of your friends and family at this years celebrations! For an easy to make twist on a classic recipe, you don't want to miss out on this patriotic appetizer!
instructions: First, cut the hard-boiled eggs in half. Put the yolks in a bowl.
Grab two bowls (or cups), fill with half white vinegar and half water. Add the red food coloring to one bowl and the blue to the other.
Place egg whites in the desired coloring for 1-2 minutes. Remove when dyed and place on a napkin or paper towel to dry.
In the bowl with the egg yolks. Add the dry mustard, yogurt, and mayonnaise. Mix together.
Use the mixture to fill the eggs.
Top with paprika.

recipes.title: Salmon Stir-Fried Noodles Recipe
recipes.description: Perfect your clean bulk with healthy fats, quality carbs, and nutrient-dense proteins, with the easy salmon stir-fry recipe from Rob Riches. Ready in less than 15 minutes!
instructions: Place egg noodles (dry/dehydrated) into a pan of boiling water along with a pinch of salt, and cover for 3-4 minutes.
Remove the noodles from the heat and drain. Keep the noodles in the sieve on top of the pan, and place the lid back over so that the steam keeps the noodles from drying out.
Quarter bok choy lengthwise (cutting it in half, and then repeating the process with each half).
Slice carrot into long, thin strips, about a quarter-inch thick. And chop broccoli into 1-inch long pieces.
Warm pan over medium heat. Coat with spray oil and add vegetables. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
For the sauce, add low sodium soy sauce, hot sauce, and corn starch to 2/3 cups of water and mix well.
Using a garlic press, crush the garlic cloves into the mixture and stir.
Add sauce to the stir-fry vegetables in the pan and reduce heat to a simmer for several minutes, stirring and letting the sauce reduce a bit.
Turn off the heat and mix in the noodles, coated everything evenly with the sauce.
Transfer all contents of the pan to a plate and then break apart chunks of the Trifecta Salmon and arrange on top. Then Enjoy!

recipes.title: Shrimp Stuffed Avocado Recipe
recipes.description: Creamy, savory, and eclectic, this refreshing shrimp stuffed avocado recipe is the perfect light entree or appetizer for summer. Enjoy on your own or share with some friends by the pool, this low-carb nutrient dense recipe is sure to satisfy.
ingredients: 1 oz of Bolthouse Farms Cilantro Avocado Dressing
instructions: First, cut both avocados in half and remove the pit. Using a spoon, cut out additional avocado in the center to make room for more shrimp.
Heat up the Trifecta Shrimp for 2 minutes in the microwave.
Cut up the shrimp into pieces and add into the center of the avocados. Top with diced Roma tomatoes, diced jalapenos, and drizzle lightly with the Bolthouse Farms dressing.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Simple & Healthy Bolognese Sauce
recipes.description: For a hearty and wholesome meal, this delicious sauce is a simple and healthy twist on a classic recipe. Serve over a bed of delicious zucchini noodles or over your favorite pasta. This recipe is perfect for a family dinner or a weekly meal prep!
ingredients: Trifecta Cherry Tomatoes (or Canned Crushed Tomatoes)
instructions: In a large sauce pan, heat two tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil.
With the oil heated to medium, add diced onion and garlic and saute until onion is soft, then add the carrots and celery with a pinch of salt and saute until carrots are softened.
Add tomato paste, cherry tomatoes, and chopped Trifecta beef to the skillet and stir.
Add chopped basil, oregano, and salt and pepper. Let sauce simmer over low heat for about 10 minutes, stirring regularly.
Serve sauce over zoodles or noodles of choice, then top with parsley.

recipes.title: Simple & Tasty Pesto Egg Sandwich
recipes.description: Easy, quick and super yummy egg sandwich ready to enjoy in between breaks at work or on a day off with minimal cooking required!
ingredients: Slice up some of your fav fruit (optional)
instructions: Cut bread into thick slices.
Cut into thin slices: prosciutto, radish, and egg.
Spread pesto over bread.
Add prosciutto, radish, then peeled hard-boiled egg slices.
Enjoy with your favorite fruit or salad on the side.

recipes.title: Sriracha Honey Sesame Chicken Recipe
recipes.description: A balance of spicy, sweet, and the slight yet unique taste of sesame makes this recipe a pantry-friendly favorite for your meal prep!
ingredients: ¾ cup water + 1 tablespoon garlic powder
¼ cup soy sauce, or tamari, low sodium
2 teaspoon cornstarch + 2 tablespoon water, mixed in a bowl
instructions: Place together all sauce ingredients in a medium pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to simmer and stir constantly for 2-5 minutes, allowing the sauce to slightly reduce. Add cornstarch 1 teaspoon at a time, allowing the cornstarch to react with the heat. Add a total of 3 teaspoons first and then adjust as desired. The sauce will thicken up over time. Cover and keep warm.
Dice chicken into bite-size. Add chicken to pot with sauce and mix to incorporate. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until chicken is warmed and evenly covered. Cover pot and keep warm until needed.
Reheat the rice and broccoli for 3 minutes in two separate microwave-safe bowls. Add an extra 30 seconds to a minute if extra time is needed.
In a bowl, plate the following: ⅓ cup of reheated Trifecta brown rice, followed by 4 ounces of the sesame honey ginger chicken, and ½ cup of the reheated Trifecta broccoli.
Garnish with sesame seeds, picked fresh cilantro, extra Sriracha, and/or chives & scallions. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Steak Gyros with Easy Tzatziki Sauce Recipe
recipes.description: For a quick, balanced meal, these steak gyros are almost too easy to make! Topped with a non-fat yogurt based, tzatziki sauce, you won't believe how satisfying these are!
ingredients: 4 oz of Trifecta Flat Iron Steak
instructions: In a blender, add all of the ingredients for the sauce and blend until smooth.
In a skillet, heat up the Trifecta Flat Iron Steak and saute the onions. Once the desired level of cooked has been met, remove from heat.
Top pita bread with steak, onions, arugula, and tzatziki sauce.

recipes.title: Steak Kabobs & Mediterranean Quinoa Salad
recipes.description: The perfect, easy, barbecue recipe for the summer, this steak kabob, and Mediterranean quinoa salad recipe is a meal prep staple.
ingredients: 1 4oz Piece of Trifecta Flat Iron Steak
instructions: First, cut the steak up into chunks and alternate on a wooden skewer with bell peppers.
Grill the kabob until lightly blackened on the outside.
In a bowl, heat up the Trifecta quinoa in the microwave for 2 minutes. Then in another bowl, heat up the asparagus and mushrooms for 1 1/2 minutes.
In a mixing bowl, mix the quinoa, asparagus, mushrooms, garlic, tomatoes, and red wine vinegar.
Serve the quinoa salad on the side with the kabob.

recipes.title: Surf & Turf Keto Recipe
recipes.description: Surf & Turf Keto Recipe - This surf and turf keto recipe is quick and simple! We understand you train hard. This recipe plays tribute to a fancy classic dish, and adds a whole new level of convenience and efficiency with you in mind.
ingredients: 2 Tablespoons Chimichurri Sauce (or sauce of your choice)
instructions: If making Chimichurri sauce, start by following the instructions in the linked recipe above. Reserve in a container until needed.

Reheat the steak and shrimp according to their individual Trifecta reheating instructions. You can microwave the proteins, but make sure you do this separately - the shrimp will heat up much faster than the steak will.
Reheat the veggies according to the Trifecta reheating instructions.
Plate heated veggies, proteins, and top with chimichurri sauce liberally. Garnish with avocado.

recipes.title: Tamarind-Chipotle Steak Nachos Recipe
recipes.description: Reinvent traditional nachos with a sweet and spicy steak sauce and plenty of green veggies - still giving you that crispy, chewy, savory experience you're looking for.
ingredients: 4 ounces Trifecta flat iron steak, cut into bite-size squares
18 each baked blue corn tortilla chips
¼ cup green onions, white part only, sliced thin
½ teaspoon chipotle pepper puree, canned
1 fl ounce beef stock, low sodium
instructions: Add coconut oil into a saute pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil is slightly smoking add sliced green onions and saute until translucent. Add garlic and saute, mixing often to avoid the onion and garlic from burning.
Add the steak and incorporate it into the onion mix.
Add chipotle, tamarind, and honey and mix to coat steak.

Deglaze pan with stock and stir. Adjust heat as needed to avoid food from burning. Bring the pan to a gentle boil and reduce stirring often to create a coat with the sauce as it reduces. Once ready, remove from heat and keep warm.
Plate greens followed by tortilla chips, and cold broccoli. Top with steak, spreading throughout the plate, and garnish with green onion bulbs and cilantro.
Season with lemon juice.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Tempeh Garlic Ginger Soy Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: This quick and easy tempeh recipe adds a different texture through this high-protein meat alternative and adds a punch of flavor through the sauce itself.
ingredients: 16 ounces Tempeh, diced into bite sizes
1 cup Trifecta mixed veg or broccoli
1 avocado, sliced lengthwise, divided into quarters
instructions: For sauce: In a small saucepan, heat 2 teaspoons of avocado oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and ginger, and stir often for about 1 minute or until a dark golden color begins to form. Add red pepper flakes, Chinese five-spice, and stir for another 30 seconds, until spices are bright. Immediately add the tamari, stir and bring to an aggressive simmer for 3-5 minutes. As the sauce simmers, mix cornstarch and water in a small bowl to make a slurry. Add slurry into the sauce and simmer...

Heat remaining 1 teaspoon of avocado oil in a large non-stick saute pan over medium-high heat. Add 1 teaspoon of garlic, stir to avoid garlic from burning, and immediately add diced seitan. Mix often. The goal with this step is to sear and develop a golden brown color for the seitan. Once the seitan has caramelized, add the sauce to the pan and stir. Add the Trifecta bell peppers. Coat seitan and veggies evenly and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and keep warm until needed.
Warm up the rice in the microwave for about 2-2:30 minutes, along with the Trifecta broccoli.
Portioning in 4 bowls, plate in each ½ cup of Trifecta rice, ¼ cup of broccoli, and 4.5 ounces of tempeh mix. Garnish with ¼ avocado per bowl, sesame seeds and fresh cilantro.

recipes.title: Teriyaki Beef & Rice Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: Bowls are incredibly functional and you can make them look as pretty as possible. This simple Teriyaki beef and rice bowl can be put together in no time.
ingredients: Sesame seeds, sliced scallions, cilantro, or red pepper flakes for garnish. All optional.
instructions: Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a wet paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. After the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a bowl. Keep warm.
In separate bowls microwave the brown rice and tomatoes. Air-fry/roast/blanch the Brussels Sprouts. Keep warm.

In four separate bowls, plate a rice base of ⅓ cup, followed by 4 ounces of the crumbled Trifecta beef, ½ cup of broccoli, ¼ cup of the carrot matchsticks, and 2 tablespoons of the Teriyaki sauce. Feel free to heat the sauce in a small saucepan beforehand.
Garnish with sesame seeds, scallions, cilantro, and pepper flakes. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Teriyaki Chicken Pineapple Bowl Recipe
recipes.description: Perfectly sweet and spicy, this teriyaki chicken pineapple bowl is a delicious twist on a traditional recipe. A fun recipe for yourself or at a barbecue!
ingredients: For garnish: sliced green onion, sesame seed, red pepper flakes
instructions: First, cut the pineapple in half (longways). Scoop out the insides and save as extras. Make sure to drain out most of the juice from the inside of these pineapple halves as they will serve as the bowl for your food. Gather the rest of the ingredients.
In a skillet, stir-fry the Trifecta Chicken in the avocado oil with the garlic, teriyaki sauce, and ground ginger.
Heat up the brown rice and broccoli in the microwave or stir-fry into the skillet with the chicken. Then plate your bowl! Top with sesame seeds, green onion, and red pepper flakes.

recipes.title: Thai Peanut Chicken Meal Prep Recipe
recipes.description: Creamy peanut butter combined with coconut milk creates a delicious sauce for a Thai inspired dish for any day!
ingredients: 16 ounce Trifecta chicken breast, small diced
2 teaspoon brown sugar or 1 ¼ teaspoon erythritol
1 tablespoon Soy sauce, low sodium, or tamari for gluten-free
1 teaspoon chili garlic, like Sambal Oleke
instructions: In a bowl, mix all the sauce ingredients. Whisk to incorporate. Conversely, if desired, add all ingredients into a food processor and pulse 3-4 times. Transfer to an airtight container.
Dice chicken and transfer to a large mixing bowl. Add carrots. Pour the sauce on top of the chicken and mix to coat.
Warm a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Spray with oil and once the pan is hot and oil is shimmering and beginning to slightly smoke, add the chicken coated in the sauce.

Sauté 2-3 minutes, adjusting the heat as needed, until warmed through. Taste a piece of chicken to see if the chicken is ready. Serve in a plate with favorite sides, portioning about 5 ounces of chicken mix per plate.
Season with peanuts, almonds, sesame seeds, cilantro, and/or chili flakes.

recipes.title: Vegan BBQ Tofu Stir Fry Recipe
recipes.description: By combining tofu with some whole grains, a beautiful veggie mix, and a delightful easy sauce, this stir fry dish sets out to be a winner for any day of the week.
ingredients: 1 tablespoon Tamari (gluten-free soy sauce), low sodium preferred
3 each Garlic, fresh, grated or 2 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon Ginger, fresh, grated, or 3 teaspoons ginger powder
instructions: Prepare the BBQ sauce by combining all ingredients in a bowl. Whisk to incorporate. Keep on the side.

Drain tofu and press by placing paper towels in the top and bottom of the tofu and placing a hefty book carefully on top of the tofu. Use a small sheet tray if needed to capture the water drainage. Press for at least 5 minutes, discard paper towels, and then dice block evenly. Transfer to a bowl. Season tofu with cornstarch, 2 tablespoons of the BBQ sauce, and a pinch of salt. Mix with hands to coat tofu evenly. Set aside.

Heat up avocado oil on a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil is slightly smoking (about 30-45 seconds of constant heat), add the tofu. You want to hear a sear go on as we are looking at caramelizing the tofu and browning it on most sides. Do this for about 2-3 minutes, stirring as necessary. Add the vegetables, along with the quinoa and brown rice. Saute for another 2-3 minutes until heated through. Lastly, add the sauce into the pan and mix to coat all ingredients evenly. The s...

Conversely, if you are tracking your macros closely, heat up the quinoa separately in a bowl in the microwave, covered with a damp paper towel for 2 minutes. Do the same with the Trifecta vegetables. Still reheat the tofu in the pan by searing it over medium-high heat with avocado oil and the sauce.
Portion ⅔ cup of quinoa, ½ cup of Trifecta veggies, and 4 ounce of the saucy tofu on a bowl. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro, and some sesame seeds.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan High Protein Veggie Pasta Recipe
recipes.description: This vegan pasta recipe is simple, refreshing and hearty. Made with lentil pasta with fresh cooked organic veggies and vibrant herbs in a salty and savory dressing.
instructions: Cook pasta al dente. Let cool and set aside.
Dice scallions and coarsely chop parsley for garnish. Set aside.
Combine pasta and veggies in a large bowl.
Add oil, lemon zest, and seasoning.
Finish with parsley and scallion.
Enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan Meatballs & Spaghetti Squash Pasta Recipe
recipes.description: Step-up your vegan meal prep game with this plant-based spaghetti and meatball recipe. Sure to impress, you'll want to share this with friends.
ingredients: 1 (25 oz) Jar Tomato Basil Pasta Sauce, store-bought or homemade
Pinch of Black Pepper and Sea Salt
instructions: Preheat an oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit. Place spaghetti squash cut-side down on a foil-lined sheet tray and roast for 25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let sit on the baking tray for 5 minutes. Using a fork, scrape out the inside spaghetti and set aside.
Place the beyond beef into a medium bowl, then combine all other meatball ingredients into a food processor, pulse till coarsely chopped. Mix with the beyond beef and form 1-inch meatballs.
Pre-heat a medium-sized non-stick skillet over medium heat, add oil.
Sear meatballs in the pan for 5 minutes, turning occasionally. Add Pasta Sauce and simmer for 20 minutes.
To plate: combine with spaghetti squash and top with vegan parmesan, red pepper flakes, and fresh herbs.

recipes.title: Vegan Mexican Beyond Meat Quesadilla Recipe
recipes.description: This super simple quesadilla recipe made with beyond meat burger and vegan cheese is the perfect plant based meal for your high protein vegan meal prep!
ingredients: 4 whole wheat or regular tortillas, 10” (burrito tortillas)
1 1/3 cups plant-based cheddar cheese (Daiya is a good option)
1/2 cup canned black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Working one or two tortillas at a time, sprinkle ⅓ cup plant-based cheddar cheese on one half of the tortilla, along with ⅛ cup beans, ¾ cup Beyond Meat crumbles, and ¼ Trifecta broccoli. If Beyond Meat is frozen, feel free to microwave all of it for 2 minutes. You can do the same with the broccoli. Keep all the goods on one half moon side.
Fold the other half over the side with the sprinkled goods. Repeat process for all four tortillas.

Warm-up a nonstick pan and spray with oil over medium-low heat. Toast both sides of the quesadilla for about 2-3 minutes, adjusting the heat as needed. The goal is to get both sides golden brown but also help the quesadilla guts warm and melt the cheese. The dairy-free cheese may not melt all the way but only ever so slightly.
Cut each quesadilla into even quarters and if desired, serve with about ¼ cup of your favorite salsa. Enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan Protein Chocolate Chip Mug Cake Recipe
recipes.description: This vegan chocolate chip mug cake recipe is a quick and easy dessert or snack without all the processed ingredients and added sugars.
ingredients: 1 tablespoon almond flour or coconut flour
instructions: Measure all of your ingredients and gather any additional add-ins you would like to include in your mug cake recipe.

Mix ingredients together in a small bowl using a whisk or spatula until a smooth batter forms. Coat your microwave-safe container with a small amount of coconut oil or cooking spray before transferring the batter to the container. Add any additional toppings or mix-ins.
Bake in the microwave for 1 minute and 15 seconds until done! Then enjoy!

recipes.title: Vegan Tofu Tikka Masala Recipe
recipes.description: This creamy and cozy vegan tikka masala recipe will have you inspired to spice up all your go-to recipes.
ingredients: 16 ounces of store-bought baked tofu, or 1
Trifecta A la Carte white rice
instructions: Preheat the oven to 450 degrees fahrenheit. Trim the cauliflower into small florets and, in a bowl, mix together the cauliflower, coconut oil, nutritional yeast, garam masala, and lime juice. Spread out the cauliflower onto a baking tray lined with a reusable liner or parchment paper. Bake for 20 minutes, until slightly golden, then remove from the oven. Cut the baked tofu into medium-sized pieces or prepare one recipe fried tofu and set aside.
Prepare the tikka masala sauce
Add your roasted vegetables and tofu to the simmering tikka masala sauce and cook for 5 minutes, then remove from the heat.
Serve 1-1.5 cups of masala with 1/2 cup of rice and top with chopped cilantro.

recipes.title: Vegan Vanilla Chai Protein Smoothie Recipe
recipes.description: There's no getting lost or confused with this recipe. Make it once and you'll be 100% hooked on this delicious high protein plant-based smoothie!
ingredients: 1 scoop vanilla chai plant-based protein (Momentus is a great brand)
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender. Blend and add extra milk if needed.
Transfer to a mason jar, protein shaker bottle, or glass of choice. Top with fresh berries if desired and enjoy!
